YOUR CIRCLE

  •  

     

     

     

     

  • Trainer Path is the transformational Path of being

    a Possibility Management Trainer.

    This Path has a beginning, but it has no end...

    BEING A TRAINER

  • The Trainer Path is one of the Archiarchal specialties of Possibilitator Training.

    Archiarchy emerges through you building out your place in Archiarchy by delivering your Nonmaterial Value. It has become clear that certain Possibilitators are called to facilitate transformational thoughtware upgrades and support healing and authentic adulthood initiations through delivering Expand The Box Trainings and perhaps, later on, also Possibility Labs.

    Delivering Possibility Trainer services with excellence for individuals, couples, groups, and gameworlds demands specific yet unusual preparations which begin by entering Possibilitator Training.

    Leaving behind baggage and making the necessary leaps and shift-processes to serve as a Possibility Trainer is a life-long Path.

    We call it the 'Trainer Path'.

    Writing, Magic, and being a Trainer are pretty much synonymous.

    Here is a video describing the 4 Tools every person on the Trainer Path will be practicing.

  • ROADMAP

    Expand The Box Training

    After seeing a video or reading a book or being at WorkTalks, Workshops, Possibility Team, Study Group, or Rage Club... the first big step is ETB.

    Expand The Box

    Possibility Labs

     

    Deep Emotional Healing Processes (EHP), authentic adulthood initiations, stellating feelings archetypes, building matrix, all happens a PLabs.

    Possibility Labs

    Possibilitator Training

    Once it is clear, a person commits to their Path. They have a Conversaview, and it they get a go, begin professional Possibilitator Training in earnest.

    Possibilitator Training

    Being a Trainer

     

    One of the Possibilitator Training Archiarchy Specialties is being a Trainer in the radically responsible context of Possibility Management. If this is you, then you are home.

    Being a Trainer

    Practice Expand The Box

    Contextual and practical instructions for preparing yourself to deliver your Practice Expand The Box.

    Practice ETB

    Possibility Lab Trainer

    Contextual and practical instructions for preparing yourself to deliver Possibility Lab.

    PLab Trainer

  • THE TRAINER PATH

    The 'Trainer Path' combines a Trainer Team on a Transformational Path.

    Entering the Trainer Path starts by committing to the Trainer Path.

    Can you commit to the Trainer Path?

    Before committing, it might be useful to know what you are committing to.

    What is the Trainer Path?

    Moreover, what is a Trainer?

    And, what is the Path?

    A TRAINER TEAM

    The Trainer Path is the team of Trainers apprenticing to become Expand The Box Trainer, and Trainers delivering Expand The Box Trainings, and Trainers delivering Possibility Labs.

     

    In the Trainer Path, you are as much committed to your own Evolution and Transformation as you committed to the Evolution and Transformation of the people in your Circle and your colleagues on the Trainer Path. You support, love and create possibility each other to shift your Point of Origin from ordinary modern culture to your own unique extraordinary responsibly-contexted culture and becoming a space through which your Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage can do their work in the world.

     

    The Trainer Path helps each other succeed, not to success.

     

    In the Trainer Path, healers heal healers. You heal each other by going through and holding space for every emotional healing process free of monetary cost.

     

    Some Trainer's Archetypal Lineage is to be a Trainer-Trainer or a Trainer-Trainer Trainer. The Trainer-Trainer's job is to train Possibilitators to become Expand The Box Trainers, and Possibility Lab Trainers.

     

    The Trainer Path creatively collaborates with Trainers and Gameworlds from other contexts to juice up Next Culture gameworlds with the powerful distinctions and initiations discovered in Possibility Management.

    TRANSFORMATIONAL PATH

    Becoming an Expand The Box Trainer requires that you shed, transform and Morph facets of your Box that are in the way for you to become an Expand The Box Trainer.

     

    The Transformational Path of the Trainer Path prepares and open doors for you to:

    • Go through the necessary 64 shift-processes to become an Expand The Box Trainer and/or a Possibility Lab Trainer.
    • Keep improving the skills and technology needed to be an Expand The Box Trainer and/or a Possibility Lab Trainer.
    • Ongoingly update yourself on the latest discoveries of PM processes, PM thoughtmaps, distinctions and context upgrade.

    The Trainer Path is supported by many spaces where Trainers meet and practice new skills.

    • Expand The Box Trainings 
    • Emotional Healing Processes such as EHP Dojo
    • Possibility Labs 
    • Possibility Teams
    • Rage Club Spaceholder Training
    • Fear Club Spaceholder Training
    • Mage Spaceholder Training
    • Trainer Path Lab
    • Trainer Research Days

    A TRAINER IS NOT AN EDUCATOR

    A Trainer is not an Educator.

     

    An Educator teaches to others what to know from the Educator's position of already knowing. An Educator adds knowledge to already existing 'knowledge continents', and promotes Defensive Learning - learning something new only when it fits with what you already know.

     

    An Educator is not a Trainer.

     

    A Trainer stands in the nature of reality - nothingness and groundlessness - holds and navigates space for participants to discover what they didn't know they didn't know about. A Trainer lands whatever distinction is needed by your clients and participants. The Trainer as well as the participants navigate spaces of expansive learning - where the learning doesn't build on previous knowledge but comes out of a different knowledge continent. To create a different knowledge continent, the Trainer creates a space with a Point Of Origin anchored in a different context than the context of Modern Culture. In that sense, your training is also a transformational school. Good news that you are in one too!

     

    There is many many schools for educators. Almost every schooling system in the world is a school to teach teachers. There are almost no schools for Trainers. You have found one.

     

    Yes, it is true that from time to time your Trainer job in the moment might be to incite Education. In these moments there is the Clarity that in actuality, you cannot teach a person anything, but anyone can learn whatever they want. It is not about you.

    AN EXPAND THE BOX TRAINER

    In the PM gameworld we pay Attention to the name of things. This is what we have figured out.

    • A 'Possibility Manager' is someone who loves and uses Possibility Management personally and professionally.
    • A 'Possibility Coach' is someone who has been through at least 5 Possibility Labs, watched the 100 Possibility Coaching demonstration videos at Create Possibility, has made their Possibility Coach website, and is delivering professional paid online-or-offline Possibility Coaching sessions.
    • A 'Possibilitator' is someone who has made a true commitment to themselves to be on the Possibilitator Path including a commitment to participating in at least 10 Possibility Labs over several years, and 3 or more ETBs with different Trainers.
    • A 'Possibility Trainer' or 'Possibility Management Trainer' is someone: 
      • Who has been a committed participant in Possibilitator Training
      • Who has built up their Circle by going through the 10 Possibilitator Doorways
      • Who has discovered along that way that their 'Possibilitator Specialty' is 'Trainer',
      • Who has been asked by the Possibility Management Infinity Ring Trainer-Training Node to deliver a 'Practice Expand The Box Training'  in their presence
      • Who has delivered their Practice Expand The Box Training and was certified by the Possibility Management Infinity Ring Trainer-Training Node to be an 'ETB Trainer', and
      • Who is now delivering paid Expand The Box trainings.

    A PIRATE ON A PIRATE TEAM

    "I am free, no matter what rules surround me. If I find them tolerable, I tolerate them. If I find them obnoxious, I break them. I am free because I know that I alone am morally responsible for everything I do." - Robert H. Heinlein.

    A participant once said, in a Heal From School Lab that one of their biggest fear to abandon all rules (this would also include abandoning all constructs such as School, the Corporation, a Government, Hierarchies and the Economy, as any form of justifications for your behaviours) is that without any rules, Gremlin rules.

    It is outrageous to make the suggestion that the entire population of the Trainer Path might be Pirates.

    It is even scarier to make such promotion at the risk of empowering extremely well-defended and well-justified unconscious 'Trainer' Gremlin to 'do whatever the hell they want' under the banner of Being a Pirate. One of the traps of gaining Clarity is that a clever Gremlin can hijack its language to serves its own survival purposes, and along the way fool the owner of said Gremlin about what is really going on. (Avoiding any misunderstanding, I do not mean that Clarity can serve the 'dark side'. Clarity is a Bright Principle. Gremlins can, however, twist the language of Clarity.)

    And at the same time, how can you be a Trainer and not be a Pirate?

    In Possibility Management, Pirate is written with a capital 'P' to distinguish it from the ordinary small 'p' pirate who cheats, deceives, lies, and steal to serve the unconscious purposes of their Gremlin, Demon and Survival Strategy.

    A Pirate (capital 'P') lives, works, and plays within a self-determined transformed Gremlin, decontaminated-phase 2 Adulthood Context of Radical Responsibility, Radical Honesty, Radical Simplicity, Radical Relating, and Radical Reliance on their Infinite internal and external Resources, such as The Pearl, Bright Principles, Archetypal Lineage, Earth Coincidence Control Office (E.C.C.O.), the Unknown, the Void of Nothingness, and so on.

    If a Trainer is not a Pirate, then you are hookable by any of the rules you Believe to be immovably true. From the identity of a Pirate, there is no such thing as an immovable rule. There is only Radically Responsible Choosing followed by consequences. Karma does exist. Action and inaction (and fake action...) have consequences in Reality.

    How do Pirates who are not bound by morality, niceties, social constructs, assumptions, expectations, conclusions, judgments, projections, opinions, beliefs or even protocols even talk to each other? Even more, how do they Collaborate with each other?

    A more appropriate question is: How can Trainers talk to each other, even more, collaborate with each other, if they are not Unhookable in the face of morality, niceties, social constructs, assumptions, expectations, conclusions, judgments, projections, opinions, beliefs or even protocols?

    There is only one way to find the answers to these crucial Questions: Experiment!

    AN EXPERIMENTER

    Trainer Path is an Evolutionary Path.

     

    Step after step the Trainer Path is explored through doing Experiments.

     

    Why are evolutionary steps taken Experiments? Because you cannot know if your efforts will cause useful outcomes or not. Each thing you try is an Experiment!

     

    The reason it is important to Stand in the view that being on Trainer Path involves an Identity Shift to being an Experimenter is because: Experiments are done by Experimenters.

     

    Experimenters do Experiments. They cannot avoid it.

     

    This explains a lot about your life, especially if you wish to explain about your life to someone else.

     

    Almost any question someone can ask you about why you are doing what you are doing even it it does not give you more credibility in the Values of the Capitalist Patriarchal Empire can be excellently answered by enthusiastically saying the following four words, "I am an Experimenter!"

     

    But then it should be true that you are actually an Experimenter!

     

    How can you prove that you are an Experimenter?

     

    By Experimenting!

     

    By the way, this website might become your new best friend: https://becomeanexperimenter.mystrikingly.com

    A PERSON OF AGENCY

    One of the true joys of Trainer Path is having E.C.C.O. throw you into situations you have never been in before that demand Immediate Alchemical Action.

    In these circumstances you are invited / challenged / requested to Pull The Rug Out from under current reality and cause New Results, to Cause Transformation, to Cause Adventure, to cause Aliveness... even if you are not familiar with the terrain.

    "Agency... capacity to act." (From the novel Agency by William Gibson, page 31.)

    A Trainer Pather is, by Necessity, a Person Of Agency.

    Yes, by Necessity. One of the key secret ingredients for you being a Trainer is Creating Authentic Necessity for you being in action as a Trainer, Committing to that Necessity, then letting the rest of your life fall where it may.

    Authentic Necessity is not created at the Bullshit level of Stories, Assumptions, Expectations, etc. Authentic Necessity starts with changing the shape of your Being, which as a result, forces the Universe to interact with you differently than it did before.

    Any questions?

    Good!

    Go!

  • HOW DO YOU KNOW?

    How does the Universe know that you are an Expand The Box Trainer?

    Or, a Possibility Lab Trainer?

    EVOLUTIONARY CLARITY EMERGING IN THE TRAINER PATH AND PM GAMEWORLD

    (revised 12 November 2024)

    NOTE: The following letter is the most recent in a multi-year series of invitations and boundaries, distinctions and possibilities exchanged amongst the group of people that used to be referred to as the 'Possibility Management Trainer Guild'.

    Possibility Management is an evolutionary gameworld. This means that part of the nonmaterial value created and delivered by Possibility Management is personal and organizational evolution, also referred to as transformation. What we as a gameworld have been learning is that evolutionary gameworlds must also evolve, transformational gameworlds must also transform.

    The Possibility Management gameworld is currently (October - December 2024) in an evolutionary Liquid State. The following letter is written by Vera L. Franco, a Possibility Management Expand The Box and Possibility Lab Trainer, Gremlin Transformation Coach, a Women Of Earth spaceholder, and a global gameworld Village Weaver. Vera has been a spaceholder of and actively cocreating the Trainer Path trainings and calls since before Trainer Path began. She has been on the Possibility Management Infinity Ring in various nodes since our Infinity Ring was formed. It is legitimate that she spontaneously wrote this letter.

    Dear everyone,

    I am speaking on my personal behalf, not as a representative of the Trainer Path. I am now starting a series of back to back ETBs and a Lab ending in the first week of December so I will be off communication for a while. And I have some time now as I am on the three hour drive up to the training space in New York.

    I write to you with fear, anger and sadness. I have been crying, screaming, yelling about this change in the Trainer Path and Trainer Guild gameworld, and the heartbreaks that are contained in it. I want to tell you where I personally experience myself now and what I now see.

    I feel fear that some of you who have been in the original Trainer Guild group do not comprehend how grave it is for the Possibility Management Trainers to NOT be operating in the same context.

    This is literally one of the first maps given in an Expand The Box training (ETB): the Thoughtmap of Culture and Responsibility. The distinction is very clear: Different contexts (levels of responsibility) create different cultures.

    This means that since perhaps 2012, so-called PM Trainers are not playing the same game. We are simply not. One team is playing soccer, another team is playing volleyball, and another team is playing polo. Yes, they all use balls, they all use two teams, they all use nets, but they do not play the same game.

    The people now engaged in this PM gameworld conversation are not creating the same Possibility Management.

    And if after our calls and emails, you do not feel anger or fear about calling volleyball, polo, and soccer the same name then I cannot call you a Possibility Manager at this point, nevermind a Trainer. Or you have some block in the way of your own Stand.

    I say these exact words in every ETB while delivering the Thoughtmap of Culture and Responsibility. This is not a fantasy world. If anyone here has doubts about the relation between cultural context and its level of responsibility, think about how Possibility Management has been evolving in the last five years, building a vibrant global village with new Possibilitators, new gameworlds, new processes, new thoughtmaps, new distinctions, new teams, new traditions, and then think about in which ways you have been removing yourself from it.

    And again, I am not blaming you for removing yourself from it. It is your choice. What you choose is not bad, or evil, or dumb. You simply made some steps in another direction along the way every day for the past five years.

    Some people in this group did not. It was also their choice.

    Personally if a group of Trainers came together and told me that there was a way for me to evolve my work and my practice and my being because they had discovered amazing new practices and processes, as a precessional I would be one of the first to say "What is my next step in this?" I did that with becoming a Trainer before there was a Trainer Path, and did it within the Trainer Path, and it is the same guidance that I take which led me to go to my first Feelings Practitioner training. It is the same desire that I have within me to book myself one day soon in the Peaceful Warrior training too.

    Conversations and negotiations cannot proceed if there is no agreed upon distinction of Context (Levels of Responsibility). Even the thoughtmaps of Possibility Management can be interpreted completely differently in different levels of responsibility. I have seen it time and time again in communities, when there is a mixed context, the only possible playing field between all players is at the lowest common level of responsibility.

    I am not willing to do that. I have recently been in conferences, gatherings, summits, and communities where I cannot play full out with others because people are committed to different levels of disempowerment. I have tried to 'soften my words', 'make a bridge', 'be more understanding', 'be more of a translator'. It kills me on the inside. I can actually experience the clarity of my Bright Principles become less sharp, my intuition becoming less impersonal, less Archetypal. I can sense an ever-so-slight-dullness in me when I suppress the clarity of my Bright Principles fit someone else’s 'emotional sensitivities'.

    I have worked too hard and long to jack-in to my Archetypal Lineage for me to not let it speak loud and clear, and fiercely so.

    I wish that every single person on each of the calls we made together would have enthusiastically said, "I want to join the Trainer Path!" I am recovering from my own shock and heartbreak that this did not happen. I want the Trainer Path to thrive in diversity, but within the same context.

    Maybe I need an EHP, and I ask my team of Trainers to call me out and hold space for me if they see that, because I play in a Trainer culture game where I celebrate that I can take a risk and get feedback from my team so that I can become a clearer and simpler space through which my Bright Principles can speak in the world. But I will not stand for a pretend conversation that we are playing the same game.

    I feel sad that this conversation did not start years ago. I feel even sadder that it was someone outside the Trainer Path who noticed our mixed context and made a move for clarity and integrity in our team.

    I want to be very careful about what Possibility Management promotes in the world. If players of polo, volleyball, and football are all called 'Trainers', then there already exist hundreds of 'PM Trainers' delivering Rage Clubs, Fear Clubs, Rage Club Spaceholder Trainings, WorkTalks, Workshops, etc. Then we make no distinction between any spaceholder who uses PM Tools and thoughtmaps regardless of their daily-life context. This would be telling a lie to the world about who we are.

    I have personally been and still am in a massive Liquid State about this evolutionary PM gameworld change. I have questions like:

    • "If it is not Radical Responsibility, can it even be called Possibility Management, seeing that PM comes from radically responsible thoughtware?"
    • "What about Archiarchy? I want to build Archiarchal cultures all over the world. But who would inhabit them if even in the Trainer Guild there isn't a common context?"
    • "Can Possibility Management also hold other contexts? Where is the line?"

    I am still discovering this for myself and with other people that are caring for Possibility Management at a Gameworld Building level. This is why, in my view, these changes happen in steps. The Trainer Guild has been having this same conversation for several years now already. Right now it is time to be with the full impact of what it means that we are not playing the same game. I want to shout loud to each one of us that the Trainer Guild is dead! This is the impact of a mixed context. The Trainer Guild is dead.

    Until very recently the Trainer Guild was assumed to be in the same context. Back then there was a distinction of calling someone a 'Trainer' and calling someone something else. Back then a Trainer was called a 'Trainer' because they would deliver ETBs and Labs contexted in Radical Responsibility. But if the Trainer Guild is truly defined as a group of Possibility Management Trainers who are contexted in Radical Responsibility, delivering Expand The Box Trainings and Possibility Labs, then we do not fit that definition anymore. Then there is no more Trainer Guild.

    This is not what I wish. I don't wish the Trainer Guild to be over, generalized into contextual mush, accepting anyone and anything. But the Trainer Guild was over when different Trainers started contexting themselves differently from each other. Which means that the Trainer Guild has been dead a long time. I think deep down you sense that too. I feel sad about it. I feel angry about it. I feel fear about it. But by looking directly at this mess, also something else can be born instead, and I feel joy about that.

    There has been the assumption that we are using a common website. Common to what? There is no common website anymore. Its commonality ceased to exist from the moment that we discovered that we do not play the same games.

    A new commonality between different contexts needs to be discovered, not assumed. It would be a lie to the world to let things remain as they are, to give everything the same name, and even call ourselves the same names or titles. If there is a need to discover the commonality of context between each of us, let the people who want that start that, not because of a ‘right’ over a website, but because of a willingness to be in collaborative communication, collaboration, and co-empowerment. Because without it there is no relationship.

    The intention of the next steps of the Trainer Path in regards to the website is to give enough time to gain more clarity about how to communicate the diversity within Possibility Management. Already now there are hundreds of Possibilitators all over the world offering spaces using the tools, distinctions, thoughtmaps and processes of PM, contexted in radical responsibility, not just the people in this email group.

    But most importantly for this step is that there is a clear need for guardianship about what offers would go into the possibilitymanagement.org website, and what offers do not. Is it all the offers of anyone using the 4 Feelings Thoughtmap even if they context it in Tantra, Emotional Management, Improvisational Dance, or somatic experiencing? How do we make sure that there is quality in the offering and alignment with the context of Radical Responsibility and the building of Archiarchy? These questions will need clear communications and negotiation with the guardianship team, otherwise we will have a big mess on our hands.

    How Possibility Management presents itself in the Possibility Management calendar website must be in integrity with its inside, and Possibility Management has evolved. It is not the same as it was even one year ago.

    In heartbreak, and also in clarity.

    I’m here.

    Vera.

    verafranco.org

    CAN YOU BE ON THE TRAINER PATH TEAM?

    Trainer Path is but one of dozens of Possibilitator Specialties emerging during the two to five years of Possibilitator Training. Trainer Path is NOT the space to decide if your destiny is to be a Trainer. Your Trainer knacks become clear through what you create while going through the 10 Doorways of the Possibilitator Path.

    Ninety-five percent of participants in the Possibilitator Training are NOT destined to be Possibility Trainers. They have other destinies needed in Archiarchy, such as Feelings Practitioner, Possibility Coach, Archan Economist, Archan Permaculturist, Gameworld Consultant, Gameworld Demolisher, Heart Gym Host, etc.

    Developing your Trainer skills depend on you already having developed your Possibilitator Skills.

    Trainer Path is your Process of refining and strengthening the exact skills you need to serve as an Expand The Box Trainer, and then, possibly, as a Possibility Lab Trainer.

    The only remaining question is: can you be on the Team?

    The Trainer Path uses Torus Technology as its meeting and decision technology. This includes the use of the Amoeba Process, which relieves any one person in the Trainer gameworld having to personally decide if you are 'in or out'. The Amoeba Process is an organic inclusion process that relies on the gameworld to 'eat' a new member when it has become obvious that this person is needed for the bien-être of the gameworld.

    When is it obvious that you are on the Trainer Path Team? You are on the Team when the Legends of your actions align with the Purpose of the Trainer Path, and when the Trainer Team ongoingly experiences your Creative and Collaborative Communications.

    This means, you have completely and thoroughly evolved out of the adolescent phase of making Assumptions, turning them into Expectations, waiting until your expectation is broken so that your Gremlin can feed on Resentment and take Revenge on the Possibility Management gameworld as a whole, on the Trainer Path gameworld, or any one Trainer or Possibilitator. The only purpose to make assumptions in the first place is to have 'a good reason' to hate whom you already hate. The healing process from Revenge requires a public process (online or offline) with every Trainer that you have hated and taken revenge on, and completely and absolutely let your Box die by apologizing that you could even think about using the Trainer Path as food for your Gremlin. Until that process is completed, there is not a chance for you to get anywhere close to the Trainer Path. We are not interested in Child-Gremlin-Parent offers. The ball is in your court.

    This also means that you have absolutely learn to keep your center from Possibility Management at all time. You categorically refuse to blame, resent, be victimized by any of the distinctions or process of Possibility Management, or any of the feedback, coaching and possibility you receive from your Possibilitator Team. You have learned to take care of yourself 100% around anybody while staying Radically Relating with your Team.

    In addition, if you find your Gremlin complaining and comparing your Path to other people's Path - by thinking, for example, 'how come I have to do that when that other person did not have to!', this would be a strong sign that you are still allowing your Gremlin to have considerations about your Trainer Path. If you think the Trainer Path is a fair gameworld, or respond to the concept of equality, you are in the wrong gameworld. If you want to do something about it, please go through as many Emotional Healing Processes it takes for you to enter and source the unreasonably Extraordinary context of the Trainer Path.

    HOW TO BUILD TRAINER PATH MATRIX FOR BEING ON THE TRAINER PATH

    All Possibility Management Trainers - this means Possibilitator Training Trainer Path Specialists, ETB Apprentice Trainers, ETB Trainers, PLab Apprentice Trainers, and PLab Trainers - are on the Trainer Path, because a Trainer's Path never ends. There is 'no top end' on the Trainer Path. It does not work to think you are a Possibility Trainer and not be on the Trainer Path.

    The Trainer Path does NOT include Inactive Trainers, or Trainers who are delivering predominantly mixed-context work. An 'Inactive ETB Trainer' is an ETB Trainer who has NOT delivered an online-or-offline ETB during the previous 12 months. An 'Inactive PLab Trainer' is a PLab Trainer who has NOT delivered an in-person PLab during the previous 12 months.

    HINT: Check with your 3Cell, your Possibility Coach, your Possibilitator colleagues, and your Possibility Team multiple times about how you are doing with each of the following elements on this list of Practice Expand The Box qualifications BEFORE you trouble your Trainer Path Team with giving you feedback and coaching about these things.

    NOTE: Many Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) may be required for you to become a person who can become a qualification which you have been avoiding.

    1. COMMIT TO TRAINER PATH: Get ready to discover that you do not know how to Commit. Get ready to face into your clever strategies for avoiding Radical Responsibility through avoiding Commitment, avoiding Taking A Stand, avoiding giving Your Word, avoiding Integrity, avoiding Accountability. Your destiny lights up as you Commit to the Possibilitator Specialty of the Trainer Path.
    2. RADICALLY RELATE WITH OTHER TRAINER PATHERS: You use Collaborative Communication to Radically Relate with the other Trainer Pathers. Giving feedback and coaching is NOT collaboratively communication. Giving feedback and coaching is keeping yourself away and unconcerned with the transformational journey of your Trainer colleague. Pressure Rapid Learning is a useful skill in a fast training environment to try as many different behaviours as you can, it is not a tool to radically relate with other Trainers.
    3. COMPLETE THE POSSIBILITATOR TRAINING 10 DOORWAYS: You complete the 10 Doorways of Possibilitator Training.
    4. MEMORIZE THE TRAINER PATH GAMEWORLD CODEX AND RULES OF ENGAGEMENT: You literally memorize the contents of the following 4 websites made specifically to support you on the Trainer Path:

    1. http://trainerguild.org

    2. http://beingatrainer.mystrikingly.com

    3. http://trainerpath.mystrikingly.com

    4. http://practiceexpandthebox.mystrikingly.com

    1. PARTICIPATE ENTHUSIASTICALLY IN TRAINER PATH OPPORTUNITIES: You regularly participate in Trainer Path calls, Trainer Path Labs, Trainer Research Days, etc.
    2. PARTICIPATE ENTHUSIASTICALLY IN AT LEAST 10 POSSIBILITY LABS: On the Trainer Path, you actively participate in a minimum of 10 Possibility Labs with different Trainers around the world over a period of 2-4 years. PLabs are where you integrate the distinctions and thoughtmaps of Possibility Management into practical use in your 5-Bodies for you daily life. Somewhere along the path (often after Possibility Lab #6 or #7) you will hopefully relocate your Point Of Origin into the context of Extraordinary (Radical Responsibility, Unhookability, Radical Relating, High Drama, etc.) and simply refuse to move it back. This might make you think that you have gotten all you can from PLabs. What we have found is that by doing Possibility Labs #8, #9, #10, you start gaining access to the Archetypal Domains. The processes you go through in Expand The Box Trainings and Possibility Labs are authentic adulthood initiatory processes. If you do not experience each adulthood initiation personally yourself, how useful would you be trying to Navigate these processes for someone else? The alchemist takes her own medicine before giving it to her client.
    3. PARTICIPATE ENTHUSIASTICALLY IN 10 ADDITIONAL EXPAND THE BOX TRAININGS: In Trainer Path, you participate in a minimum of 10 additional Expand The Box trainings, in various locations with various Trainers, at least 5 of these as an Apprentice Expand The Box Trainer at the side of an already certified Expand The Box Trainer. Each Expand The Box Training is unique in and of itself, AND it is also unique for you, because you are evolving. Expand The Box Training is full of Distinctions and Initiations. During your first Expand The Box Training you might 'get' 10-20% of the Distinctions offered. You will most probably totally forget some Thoughtmaps. In each Expand The Box Training, you dive deeper into the brilliance and potential of each of the 40 Thoughtmaps delivered in ETB. Participating in Expand The Box Trainings as an Apprentice Expand The Box Trainer includes that you have negotiated with the certified Expand The Box Trainer to have meetings during breaks where you ask authentic questions, ask for and receive possibility for you to be even more at risk, and take any opportunity to deepen your own Expand The Box context.
    4. KEEP PARTICIPATING IN PLABS: You continue participating in further Possibility Labs and Specialty Labs even while you are delivering Expand The Box trainings.
    5. EARN 2000 MATRIX POINTS IN STARTOVER.XYZ: You have registered over 2000 Matrix Points in the StartOver.xyz free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline matrix-building thoughtware-upgrade personal-transformation true-life adventure-game.
    6. READ POSSIBILITATOR BOOKS: You have read over 100 of the more than 250 recommended books from http://possibilitybooks.mystrikingly.com.
    7. WATCH POSSIBILITATOR FILMS: You have watched over 200 of the more than 350 recommended films from http://possibilityfilms.mystrikingly.com.
    8. SERVE IN ALL 4 ARCHETYPAL LINEAGES: A Possibility Trainer is a Generalist, not a Specialist. Some people think that a 'Jack-Of-All-Trades is the Master of none.' This means they are afraid to realize that a Jack-Of-All-Trades is a Master of the Jack-Of-All-Trades Trade. Use Feedback and Coaching to find out which of the 4 Archetypal Lineages you are weakest in, and do whatever it takes to gain the necessary skills to ongoingly create valuable results in all 4 Archetypal Lineage categories: Guardian, Village Weaver, Evolutionary, and Gameworld Builder. Learning these skills will undoubtedly necessitate numerous EHPs and Go-Beep-Shift-Go sessions with real-time feedback and coaching from your Teams.
    9. YOUR WEBSITE: You have already built your own Possibilitator Trainer Path website with your articles, your videos, your WorkTalks and Workshops, and the services you provide.
    10. WRITE YOUR ARTICLES: You are already writing and publishing at least one 3-5 page Article each month relating to Possibility Management experiences, possibilities, distinctions, healings, discoveries, etc.
    11. POSSIBILITY TEAM: You have already been Navigating both Nonlinear and Unreasonable Space at your own weekly online-or-offline Possibility Team or Study Group for more than one year. Start with two or three people if you have to. There are many options in Possibility Team. For example, each week you can read one S.P.A.R.K. and do the S.P.A.R.K. experiments together. During the week, keep doing the experiment. The following week check-in about the results and insights your team has during the week. Then do the next SPARK. There are over 230 SPARKs in English, enough for more than 4 years.
    12. EMOTIONAL HEALING INTENSIVE: At some point early on during your Trainer Path you arrange a Team of EHP Spaceholders (something around 6 EHP facilitators, and perhaps also reserve a place in an EHP Dojo) to rotate being 'on-duty' for you 24 hours a day for a minimum of two weeks so that you can do an Emotional Healing Intensive, which is Noticing and immediately use EVERY Emotion that arises as a Doorway for an Emotional Healing Process right then. No delay. No procrastination. It does not matter if your next emotion comes 5 minutes after completing your most recent EHP, you alert your Team and you go through your Process immediately. Trust the Process! Be SURE to make abundant notes in your Beep! Book to track all that comes up and all that happens, including date, time, Spaceholder(s), triggers, emotions that arise, Voices in your head, old decisions, new decisions, Energetic Blocks banished, Energetic Parts retrieved, and a clear formulation of your new or modified Practices. Writing it all down is exceptionally important. If you don't write it down, it did not happen.
    13. GREMLIN TRANSFORMATION: You have Transformed your Gremlin with the guidance of a paid Gremlin Transformation Coach to be at your side as an agent of Radical Clarity and Nonlinear Possibility. This is a one-year Process. Your Gremlin sits at your side as an ally in daily life.
    14. ADULT EGOSTATE DECONTAMINATIONS: Thoroughly Decontaminate your Adult Egostate from your Child, Parent, Gremlin, and Demon Egostates under the guidance of a paid Decontamination Coach. This is a two-year Process. The decontamination process includes recovering from the addiction of Gremlin Violence, Gremlin Self Cannibalism and Dramaholism.
    15. RAGE CLUB: After participating in your first Expand The Box Training, attend an Introduction to Rage Club. Then participate in an online-or-offline Rage Club (4-8 week Series) including the 3-3-3 Anger Practice . Then deliver 5 Rage Club Intro WorkTalks yourself. Then apply to participate in a Rage Club Spaceholder Training (6-8 weeks). Then start delivering your own online-or-offline Rage Clubs (4-8 weeks). We strongly suggest that from time-to-time you join another Trainer's Rage Club again as a participant so as to keep deepening your Context and building your own Matrix about Anger, Space Navigating, and Transformation.
    16. FEAR CLUB: After participating in your first Rage Club, attend an Introduction to Fear Club. Then participate in an online-or-offline Fear Club (4-8 week Series) including the 3-3-3 Fear Practice. Then deliver 5 Fear Club Intro WorkTalks yourself. Then apply to participate in a Fear Club Spaceholder Training (6-8 weeks). Then start delivering your own online-or-offline Fear Clubs (4-8 weeks). We strongly suggest that from time-to-time you join some other Trainer's Fear Club again as a participant so as to keep deepening your Context and building your own Matrix about Fear, Space Navigating, and Transformation.
    17. BUILD YOUR CIRCLE: You build up Your Circle to at least 700 readers on your mailing list (not just dead email addresses, but actual readers who open your messages) to whom you send your monthly Newsletter. (We estimate that at most 3% of your Circle will be ready to enroll in your Expand The Box training at any one time. 700 x .03 = 21 paid ETB participants)
    18. ESCAPE THE 8 PRISONS: You have already escaped the 8 Prisons, in reality, not in your imagination. We will test you.
    19. BECOME A GLOBAL CITIZEN: You have already become a Global Citizen and a Cultural Creative by traveling on foot and with backpack alone through South East Asia or Africa for a minimum of 6 – 24 months.
    20. FIND YOUR BRAIN COLOR: You know what Brain Color is dominant in your head, and you can identify and relate with the other brain colors well.
    21. LIVE IN EXPERIENTIAL REALITY: You have already shifted out of Verbal Reality and live in Experiential Reality.
    22. YOU HAVE ENTERED ADULTHOOD: Your Mother and Father are truly behind you as your Ancestors so that you have already entered the domain of Adulthood.
    23. STELLATED ALL 4 FEELINGS: You have Stellated all 4 Feelings and turned on your Feelings Archetypes in your daily life.
    24. THE WALL: You have faced The Wall.
    25. FLOOR PROCESSES: You have gone through, and also navigated for others, all 13 Floor Processes.
    26. REACTIVITY: You have dismantled your Reactivity.
    27. BECAME UNHOOKABLE: You are essentially Unhookable through using your 13 Tools in your daily life.
    28. LIVE IN ARCHIARCHAL ECONOMICS: You are delivering enthusiastically and unreasonably your Nonmaterial Value that you do not have time for your corporate job and live in Archiarchal Economics because you are already making more than enough money to thrive (not just survive…) at the fringes of modern culture through delivering paid:
      1. Worktalks.
      2. Workshops.
      3. Completing Incomplete Emotions Parties.
      4. Individual online-or-offline Possibility Coaching sessions (5/week).
      5. Rage Clubs.
      6. Fear Clubs.
      7. Gremlin Transformations.
      8. Adult Egostate Decontaminations.
    29. COLLABORATIVE RELATING WITH A PARTNER: What is your life truly like behind closed doors? Being a Possibility Trainer is not a show, it is a lifestyle. In this day and age, everybody is crazy. How can you experience sanity in modern culture's insane gameworlds with all those other insane naked monkeys? The way is through Collaborative Relating. If you are Accountable, if you do Completion Loops, if you can consciously Listen, if you actually do what you say you are going to do in Integrity, if you have made your Relating Space into a Gremlin-Free Zone, if you Say What You Want, if you Make Boundaries, are not Adaptive, refuse to do Low Drama, and refuse to be Abused, you are doing Collaborative Relating. 'The proof is in the pudding', so they say, and the pudding shows up at home behind closed doors. You have Evolved your Relating to the Adulthood level with your partner… which implies that you are relating with a partner. If you are not living with a partner, start by reading S.P.A.R.K. 157.
    30. TECHNOPENURIAPHOBIA HEALING: You have escaped from Technopenuriaphobia because you can sleep outside in the forest or desert alone for three nights, you can start a fire by rubbing 2 stick together (and 5 other ways without matches or a lighter), you can identify and eat dandelions, you can drive a stick-shift manual-transmission vehicle and can change a flat tire, you can cook a feast for 13 people, you can juggle 3 things, you can sing a song, you can find the North Star or the Southern Cross, you carry the Death Prayer and can deliver it.
    31. HEAL FROM SCHOOL: There are so many countless wounds and scars that you carry from modern culture schooling, so much wasted time, so much lost potential. It takes tremendous courage, but you can do it: Heal From School.
    32. PIRATE JOKES: You can tell the 6 Pirate Jokes so they land in the Space.
    33. SKILLED IN FIRST AID AND HANDLING EMERGENCIES: You carry a valid Red Cross First Aid Certification card that includes training in Artificial Resuscitation and the proper use of a Defibrillator.
    34. TORUS MEETING TECHNOLOGY AND PROCESSES: Modern culture functions using hierarchical organizations. This is a terribly costly design error. Hierarchy guarantees hijacking from psychopaths, because the personality who can best do whatever it takes to gain a position of power is the psychopath. You refuse to participate in hierarchical spaces, and can replace any hierarchy with a toroidal meeting. You carry a Purple Card for use in Torus Technology meetings and you can liberate creative chaos using Torus Meeting processes. You are already implementing Torus Technology in the gameworlds you participate in, including Torus Technology Thoughtmaps, tools, and Processes.
    35. ARCHIARCHY KIVA: You have joined the Archiarchy Kiva Team and have moved at least 100€ of your own money to circulate around the world in 25€ rotating microloans through the Archiarchy Kiva Team.
    36. ECOVILLAGE UNDERWORLDS: You have become less naïve through living in one Ecovillage for at least 3 months and visiting several others to get a taste of the Upperworld, Middleworld, and Underworld of Gaian Gameworlds.
    37. COLLABORATIVE GAMEWORLD BUILDING: You have started to build out new gamespace in the Possibility Management global gameworld as a Bridge to Archiarchy through delivering your services.
    38. CAVITATE, HOLD AND NAVIGATE RADICAL RESPONSIBILITY SPACES: You can already Cavitate, Hold and Navigate Space that is Contexted in Radical Responsibility.
    39. SET CONTEXT FOR HEALING AND INITIATION: You can already Set Context for and Navigate 3 Phase Healing Liquid States and Adulthood Initiatory Processes in Transformational Space.
    40. EXITED SELF-REFERENCING SPACEHOLDING: You have expanded your restricting sphincters to the degree that your Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage are not limited to work through your worldview, your own experiences. Your Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage come through inhibited.
    41. DISTINCTIONARY.XYZ: You have read and studied the Distinctionary all the way through at least once.
    42. LANDING DISTINCTIONS IN SPACES: You can land the definitions for Patriarchy, Psychopath, Zombie, Archiarchy, Possibilitator, Nonmaterial Value, Gremlin, and Radical Responsibility in any training Space.
    43. MORE THAN 100 S.P.A.R.K.s: You have Studied and done the Experiments in more than 100 S.P.A.R.K.s, and you have registered the S.P.A.R.K. Matrix Codes in your free account at StartOver.xyz.
    44. A LIFE OF LEARNING: You have created for yourself a Life Of Learning even if your mother does not understand.
    45. A LIFE OF PRACTICE: You have created for yourself a Life Of Practice even if it drives your father crazy.
    46. GETTING RID OF YOUR BAGGAGE: You have offloaded 50% of your Baggage that has built up over the years, consisting of Assumptions, Beliefs, Conclusions, Confusion, Denial, Expectations, Fear Of Connection, Judgements, Justifications, Lying, Manipulation, Positionality, Prejudices, Projections, Reactivity, Reasons, Resentment, Revenge, Self Deception, and Stories.
    47. MEMETIC ENGINEERING: You understand Memetics and can deliver Memetic Engineering to locate and transform Memetic Constructs such as Beliefs, Brain Splits, Mind Machines, Healing From Monogamy, and other Baggage.
    48. CLOSED THE CAFÉ: You have permanently closed the vampire demon Café and are an active Trigger Hunter.
    49. EXITED YOUR FANTASY WORLDS: You have already banished over 90% of the vampire Fantasy Worlds sucking out your life energy causing you to be naïve and diminished.
    50. POSSIBILITY COACHING SESSIONS: You deliver online-and-offline Possibility Coaching sessions with an average of 5 paid clients per week.
    51. RETRIEVED YOUR BALLS AND YOUR CENTER: You have permanently taken your Balls back from your mother and your Center back from your father.
    52. LEAVE PATRIARCHY, BECOME ARCHAN: You have Shifted Your Identity, relocated your Point Of Origin, moved out of Patriarchy, and are already an Archan.
    53. OWNING YOUR BOX PROGRAMMING: You know which of the 18 Standard Boxes you cobbed together to create your Box's primary Survival Strategy, and through Self Observation you know your Parts. You are bringing your various Identities into a singular 'I', and you own your Box. Your Box's Nits do not take over your life or your relating anymore.
    54. SHIFTED IDENTITY TO TRAINER: You love, and are fed, nurtured, and endlessly inspired by Being A Trainer, especially outside of training spaces. This is not something you force on yourself. It is not work. It is home, finally. The world is yours to play in, to create valuable results. You look into your eyes in the mirror and you see standing there a Possibility Trainer.
    55. JACKED INTO THE SOURCE OF THE THOUGHTMAPS: You have jacked-in to the Source of each of the 40 to 50 core Thoughtmaps of Expand The Box Training – and can deliver them without using 'cheat' cards or notes. You do not own the Thoughtmaps only from your mind, but rediscover each Thoughtmap anew each time you deliver it, from the Source of each Thoughtmap, so that each Thoughtmap lands fresh in the Training Space and in each Participant's 5 Bodies.
    56. JACKED INTO THE SOURCE OF THE PROCESSES: You have jacked-into the Source of each of the Processes necessary for a Training Space to be called an Expand The Box Training. The Spaces that you Navigate and the Processes you deliver are clear and strong enough to qualify your people to participate in Possibility Labs.
    57. CREATIVE COLLABORATION RATHER THAN RIGHT / WRONG OR GOOD / BAD: Your relating and collaborating ongoingly emerges from the Adulthood context of "Yes, and..." creative collaboration, Invention, and Improvising, rather than still being at your parent's home or back in school, desperately looking for the 'right answer' so you do not get punished again. Instead, you remain totally amazed, and you Improvise from the Free And Natural Adult Egostate.
    58. CULTURE-TO-CULTURE CONVERSATION: You remain Centered in First Position and respect your own Culture at least as much as - and perhaps a little more than - you respect the Culture / Gameworld / Context of others.
    59. THROUGH THE EYE OF THE NEEDLE: You can build a solid foundation in your Participants of Distinctions, Matrix, and Liquid States to be able to fully engage and integrate the results of the authentic adulthood and archetypal initiatory processes delivered in Possibility Labs. In other words, you bring ETB participants through the Eye Of The Needle into an ecstatic life of evolution, discovery, healing, and transformation.
    60. PRACTICAL GENEROSITY: After you sucessfully deliver your Practice Expand The Box, you pay the €650 fee for having your Trainer profile on http://possibilitymanagement.org.

    The reason why all these skills, all these processes, all these precisions, all these books and films, all these websites, all these experiments, and all this Matrix-Building is so important is that exactly these resources are required to deliver Expand The Box Trainings. How do we know this? We learned it the long, slow, hard, painful way from decades of delivering Expand The Box trainings! Exactly these things are what prepare you to deal with what actually is going on in Expand The Box Trainings. You gaining these capacities is what makes it safe and possible for healing and transformation to occur in reality in Expand The Box.

    This list is copied from http://practiceexpandthebox.mystrikingly.com (revised 8 October 2022)

    EVOLUTIONARY CLARITY EMERGING IN THE TRAINER PATH AND PM GAMEWORLD

  • PLAYING FULL OUT ON THE PATH

    YOUR PROBLEMS GET BIGGER

    Upon entering the Trainer Path, your problems get bigger.

    The Trainer Path happens only if someone sources it. Who sources the Trainer Path? That would be you and every other Trainer. Each team member sources the Team at the level of responsibility and matrix from which they can source the Team.

    When you enter the Trainer Path, most people can source the Team better than you can. So what? They have worked hard and build the matrix to do so by sourcing the Team when others could do it better than them. This is the organism of the Team, team members keep replacing themselves where they are competent. The result is no one is perfectly competent where they are. Everyone is learning to source what they don't know how to source yet. This is an evolutionary gameworld.

    Every dimension of the Trainer Path needs sourcing and more, the dimensions that do not exist yet are waiting to be discovered and brought into the lightspeed spaceship of the Trainer Path.

    There are different spaceholding circles bringing together the Trainer Pathers who take a certain level of responsibility in the gameworld of the Trainer Path such as:

    • Spaceholders of the Trainer Path Possibilitator Specialty: Anne-Chloé Destremau and Clinton Callahan
    • The Trainer Training Node of the PM Infinity Ring: Clinton Callahan, Anne-Chloé Destremau, Vera Franco, Cornelius Butz & Ana Norambuena
    • The Possibilitator Training Infinity Ring: Ana Norambuena, Vera Franco, Anne-Chloé Destremau (and to some degree Clinton Callahan)

    YOU ARE AN ACTIVE PLAYER IN THE GAMEWORLD OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT

    At a certain point on your Trainer Path, your perspective will shift from a personal one to a gameworld-wide one. This shift happens while you are on the Trainer Path. Your question(s) will shift from: how can I be a better Trainer? to What am I doing to make Possibility Management and Archiarchy happen right now?

    From this perspective, being on the Team means you act not only for your own benefit, or gameworld but for the benefit of the Possibility Management Trainer Guild itself.

    As a Trainer Pathwalker, you become an active player in the Possibility Management gameworld by taking responsibility and sourcing more and more of the following:

    • You create legend-making actions on your own behalf in the name of the Possibility Management Trainer Path.
    • You build a team who love Possibility Management and collaborate with you to grow the context in their local area.
    • You leave post-cards and flyers leaving seed for your work in Possibility Management as well as Possibility Management books in bookstores, cafés, centers, schools, city halls, wherever you go.
    • You create outfits, dances, or theater pieces for the Trainer Path and you showcase them in talks, workshops, festivals, trainings, YouTube videos and on your website.
    • You regularly attend conferences, summit, festivals, fairs to deliver talks, workshops and presentation and synergistic connections in the name of Possibility Management.
    • You collect notes, ideas, distinctions and starting to write The Book to share with people what you are learning from the context of radical responsibility and/or the thoughtware, tools, processes and training of Possibility Management.
    • You make and upload a stream of videos, recordings, podcasts, animations, computer games, apps to demonstrate Possibility Management for people.

    You collaboratively support the Team to deliver thoughtware upgrade from the context of radical responsibility:

    • through Expand The Box, Feelings Workshop, Rage Club, Fear Club, Sadness Club, Gremlin Transformation, Decontamination of the Adult Egostate, and other manifestation of the Possibility Management gameworld.
    • and talks and workshops opening doors to allow more people to enter the Possibility Management gameworld, listing your event on possibilitymanagement.org and your own personal website.

    You make enough money through Possibility Management single coaching, talks, workshops and training that you can quit your commitment to be a slave of a corporation and you keep your work in alignment with your destiny. Keep going through Emotional Healing Processes about this until it is already happening.

    EXIT HIERARCHY - ENTER CREATIVE COLLABORATION

    The Trainer Path functions as a Circle using Torus Technology for its meetings and decision-making processes. Upon entering the Torus Technology run Trainer Path, you leave behind your Gremlin-feeding Hierarchical thoughtwares and survival patterns for the benefit of holding space for the Bright Principle of Creative Collaboration.

     

    If you insist on making Assumptions and holding Expectations on your fellow Possibilitators and Trainers, you are still playing Gremlin hierachical games, instead of invoking the Creative Collaborators that you (your Being) want by your side. This applies to both assumptions and expectations that regards to your colleagues having either a lower status or a higher status than you. Keep going through as many Emotional Healing Processes as possible until it is repulsive for you to place yourself in any forms of hierarchy, whether in the Trainer Path or anywhere in your life.

     

    Even within the wonderful gameworld that is the Trainer Path, we do not all evolve at the same pace, or at the same time, or in the same domain - fortunately for us! This means that you might not understand when someone evolves in a certain way. This also means that the people in the Trainer Path might not understand when you evolve in a certain way. So, what do to?

     

    Participating in at the Trainer Path requires for you to have throughly been through Phase 1 of Adulthood, and you are ready enough to enter Phase 2 of Adulthood. In Phase 1 of Adulthood, you learn to take care of yourself at 100%. This means, you can make boundaries, ask for what you want, create what you want, stay centered, grounded, and bubbled, and gain more and more Nonlinear and Invention skills. In short, you develop an elegant Inner Structure that is functional as a Trainer in the world. The result of such Inner Structure is that upon receiving boundaries, feedback, coaching, Vacuum Questions, new Possibilities, you do NOT collapse. A collapse is the sign that your 'stability' or 'okness' is dependent on outside perspectives instead of on an inner one. The possible Liquid State is overtaken by the stronger destabilization of your own experience through the eyes of others.

     

    In Phase 1, you still swing between either being adaptive and being defensive. In your adaptive mode, your actions, reactions, experiments sprout only from self-imagined pressurized external forces. In your defensive mode, you seclude yourself from any external stimulus using the infamous rethoric of "finding [your] own way" which implies "without needing anyone's help". Clever Gremlin fooled even some 'Trainers' by dubbing this strategy "being a pirate". What is a Pirate (with a capital 'P') in a Pirate Team is expanded on under 'Clarifications'. If you find yourself needing to go away from dangerous people to find yourself again (leaving the Trainer Path, going traveling alone, abandoning your projects, ...), consider you may be starting over at the beginning of Phase 1 in that regard. If you find yourself in this case, you might want to check-in with your Teams about it.

     

    While in Phase 1, you 'clean up' - through EHPs, Rage work, Fear work, re-wiring of old thoughtwares, practices - your extremist survival strategies to find yourself at the entrance of Phase 2 of Adulthood. There, you learn and stabilize yourself in Being someone who stays connected, listen, accept, refuse and make counter proposals while Being unwavered from the inner clarity of your Radically Responsible cultural Context. Think Neo in Matrix dancing around bullets. That is as good as an image of a Trainer you can get. The plus side is that not only you can dance around hooks, you can vanish the hooks by pulling the rug out from under them; you can require your Team members to abdandon all 'bullets' (hear hooks) if they wish to be in your Presence; you can seemlessly shift shape and try new behaviours for the purpose of empowering Creative Collaboration; etc... (see 'Skills').

     

    From a solid and elegant Inner Structure's perspective, the best story to live in is your own (careful not your Fantasy story, nor your Box's or Gremlin's) but the story that empowers you to be a more conscious, healthy, caring and loving human being. That story gets shaped by your Archetypal Lineage, your Bright Principles, your Pearl, your Quest and through Feedback, Coaching, Processes, Distinctions, and Clarity from your peers and Teams as well as your participants and friends.

     

    Another way to put it is that, with an elegant Inner Structure, you trust yourself to be committed to your own Initiation, development, unfolding, and growing up process. You trust yourself to take care of yourself around anybody. This requires that you have your Sword of Clarity out at people's neck - including your own. You can then rely on the Universe to move you and give you Clarity and Possibility including through your Team members. You can be a space through which your Archetypal Lineage provides Clarity and Possibility to any of your Team members.

    MAKE TRANSFORMATIONAL PROPOSALS

    Torus Technology thrives in Circles that are contexted in Radical Responsibility, that distinguish Gremlin (and the other Egostates), and in which participants are skilled in making Proposals and Transformational Proposals. Making Transformational Proposals is mostly an unheard of, untrained and unnatural skill. Almost no evolutionary or Edgeworking Circle knows about it. This means that it could be your job to introduce Transformational Proposals to the gameworlds you work with.


    The ordinary Gremlin-filled alternative to a Proposal Culture is a Complaining Culture. The Trainer Path is an unconscious-Gremlin-free space. The Trainer Path is not a playground for your Gremlin. Therefore, it is not a space for complaining, criticizing and un-inspected Emotional Reactivity. The Purple Card is the Torus Technology tool to expose emotional reaction. Usually, the fact that the Purple Card is in place empowers you to take responsibility for noticing your own Reactivity and ask for your next Emotional Healing Process. EHPs transform about 90% of emotional Reactivity into Gold. Keep your Purple Card at the ready for the remaining 10%!

     

    If you Notice that something in the Trainer Path is not working, guess whose job it is to handle it? Yours!

     

    There is nobody else, no higher-ups, no 'adults' to take care of what it is obviously your job. Everybody else on the Trainer Path is already handling what they can see that needs to be handled. It is a gross disregard for your own Energy and Information to delegate your Jobs to others. Wake up! You are on the front lines now!

     

    It does not mean that you go alone and change the design of the Trainer Path without informing anyone. That would be the lone-wolf strategy.

     

    It goes like this:

    1. You Notice that something could be improved, or changed, or created
    2. First move after that is to consider asking questions about why the design is in such a way, you might learn that it was design that way on purpose
    3. You either request a Team for you to think about what Transformational Proposal would bring forth a new design or you come up with the Proposals yourself
    4. You bring the Proposal either to the whole Trainer Path or to the Infinity Ring of the Trainer Path to check for Resistance (another Torus technology) and its wisdom
    5. You implement the Proposal
    6. You keep reporting on the results and effects of your implementation
    7. Have Fun!
    Most of the time, other Trainer Pathers are busy implementing their own Transformational Proposals in the Trainer Path or other of their gameworlds. Do not expect other Trainer Pathers to do the work for you. If you want the support of the Trainer Path, you better be ready to make such a juicy, attractive, extraordinary offer for a common effort. Yep, you have partnered with busy Edgeworking people!

     

    Through Transformational Proposals, you take more and more Responsibility to deepen the Context of the Trainer Path and produce real Results.

  •  

    "Specialization is for insects. A human being should be able to change a diaper, plan an invasion, butcher a hog, conn a ship, design a building, write a sonnet, balance accounts, build a wall, set a bone, comfort the dying, take orders, give orders, cooperate, act alone, solve equations, analyze a new problem, pitch manure, program a computer, cook a tasty meal, fight efficiently, die gallantly."

    -Robert H. Heinlein

  • CHARACTERISTICS OF A TRAINER PATHER

    What is it like being a Possibility Management Trainer?

    http://beingatrainer.mystrikingly.com

    There is no one way to become a Trainer because Possibility Trainers are not a replica of one another.

    Each Trainer is uniquely shaped by their life experience, the initiatory processes they've gone through, their Archetypal Lineage, their Bright Principles, and their Pearl. Your Trainer Path will be equally specialized.

    However, there exist specific spaces and procedures in which Transformational Trainer skills are learned and sharpened. Like rungs on a ladder, each step is necessary to reach the next Possibility.

    The following elements are NOT suggestions. Each element is as essential to being a Possibility Trainer as a paddle is to being a kayaker.

    1

    EARN OVER 2000 MATRIX POINTS FROM PLAYING STARTOVER.XYZ

    Study http://howtoplay.mystrikingly.com, which gives you a complete introduction to the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline matrix-building thoughtware-upgrade personal-transformation true-life adventure-game with over five-hundred interlinked websites, each packed with thoughtware upgrade Distinctions and your next Experiment.

    Playing StartOver.xyz is like reading an self-designed evolution and healing book that Builds Matrix in your 5 Bodies at the fastest rate possible.
    Play in your Possibility Team. Play in your 3Cells. Play during your Possibilitator Calls.

    2

    GO THROUGH 100 EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESSES AND CREATE AN EHP DOJO

    The main resistance that exist right now for you to be a Possibility Management Trainer are your own emotional blocks to Being Present, Radically Relying on your inner and outer resources, sourcing your own culture is your radically-responsible based nanonation.

     

    There is no way around Emotional Healing Process. 100 EHP is a good start.

     

    Create or join an Emotional Healing Process Dojo for that effect.

    3

    DELIVER WEEKLY POSSIBILITY COACHINGS

    Deliver 2 paid online-or-offline Possibility Coaching sessions per week.

    By delivering Possibility Coaching, Possibility Mediation, Possibility Psychology, or Feelings Practitioner sessions you will learn from the same processes you are navigating for your clients, or you could not navigate them. Does this build your matrix? You bet it does! Plus you will earn the extra cash you need to participate in your next Possibility Labs. You do not need to work for a corporation.

    After delivering 50 coachings free of charge (as your self-made school), start charging a sliding of 80-100€/session (1-1h30 session). After your 100th paid coachings, celebrate! From then on, charge a sliding scale of 150-250€/session. This is the regular price for Possibility Coachings.

    4

    DELIVER 100 PUBLIC TALKS

    Deliver 100 WorkTalks, Interviews, Presentation and 25 one- or two-day Workshops before considering delivering Expand The Box.

    The originator of Possibility Management, Clinton Callahan, gave well over 200, two-hour talks before delivering his first Expand The Box training. We found a cardboard box full of cassette tapes of his recorded talks and are putting them online at Next Culture Radio as samples.

    During each of your talks you will learn the value of what you are saying, how to answer questions, and how to navigate Gremlin-filled spaces.

    Each talk builds Your Circle of people who know you and trust you and will help you become a Trainer by participating in your offerings. These are the people who will come to your Expand The Box trainings.

    5

    PARTICIPATE IN POSSIBILITATOR-TRAININGS AND TRAINER-TRAININGS

    Get into every Trainer Training that you can. Trainer Skills Days, Trainer Research Days, Trainer Path Labs, Trainer Skill Labs, ... Trainer Trainings are 2-day or 5-day intense skill-building training spaces. They are invested in creating a particular liquid state for spaceholder, which requires a number of Emotional Healing Process.

     

    Trainer Trainings are often delivered post-Possibility Lab to surf the wave of the liquid states of the Lab and insert finer distinctions, skills and processes needed for trainers.

    6

    TAKE A STAND FOR WHAT YOU HAVE TAKEN A STAND FOR

    You have already taken a stand to be a Trainer or you would not be reading this information.

    You have not already taken as stand for the stand you have taken.

    By the end of your fifth or sixth Possibility Lab you will probably have separated your 4 Feelings, distinguished your 4 feelings from your 4 Emotions, unmixed your Emotions, taken responsibility for a number of your Parts, be avoiding a lot of your Reactivity, transformed your Gremlin as an ally standing at your side, decontaminated your Adult Egostate from your Gremlin, Child, Parent Egostate, have your Center, Bubble, and Grounding Cord, be able to Hold Space and Navigate Space, have your Bright Principles, be using your 13 Tools, be basically Unhookable, and be able to do Dragon Speaking.

     

    Now, take a stand for the stand that you have taken. Walk down the street, go to parties, meet people with the stand that you are taking: that you are offering them a life-boat out the misery of surviving in modern culture.

     

    If you do not take that stand, they cannot get on the life-boat and you are leaving them behind playing in the obsolete gameworlds of modern culture.

    7

    ONGOINGLY UPDATE YOUR WEBSITE

    That start with making your website.

    As you go along your path as a Trainer, you will create content: events, offerings, videos, interviews, processes, articles,...
    Update regularly your website so it reflects to the best of its capacity where you are on your path right now.

    8

    SEND OUT YOUR MONTHLY NEWSLETTER

    When you have about 100 people on your mailing list, start sending out your monthly Newsletter with a photograph, a distinction, a S.P.A.R.K. experiment, and invitations to your Study Group, Possibility Team, Rage Club, and Public Talks and Workshops.

     

    More at Build Your Circle.

    9

    KEEP BUILDING YOUR CIRCLE

    Wherever you go, build Your Circle.

    This is where you start and where you finish.

    A circle has no end.

    Keep building your Circle.

    A circle is the list of email address to which you send your monthly Newsletter. Before delivering your first Expand The Box you will need to have 600 people in your Circle.

    In reality, you should have as many people in your active email data-base as you are friends with on Facebook.

     

    Go to the Global Ecovillage Network conferences and meet as many new people as you can.

    Go to where the edgeworkers gather.

     

    More on this at:

    http://yourcircle.mystrikingly.com/

    http://createanexpandthebox.mystrikingly.com

    10

    PUBLISH ONE ARTICLE PER MONTH

    Write at least one article each month and publish it on Academia or Medium about what you are researching at the moment. This is NOT a blog.

    This is NOT a post at your Facebook page.

    Write your article, 3-5 pages, with a start, a middle, and an end. It gives a distinction or two. It tells a story. It gives an example, and at the end it gets wrapped up satisfactorily, like a ribbon on a birthday present.

    Nicola Nagel, a Possibility Management trainer for the past 10 years, wrote more than 100 articles regularly on her blog.

    Each article is a bridge, a doorway, an invitation that upgrades human thoughtware.

    You never know who will read your articles.

    No one can write the way you do.

    Put your articles on your website, in your newsletters, and online at all 8 platforms.

    Writing articles is legend making... and leads to you writing your book...

    Examples:

    Nicola Nagel

    Patrizia Servidio

    Vera Luisa Franco

    Anne-Chloé Destremau

    Clinton Callahan

    11

    GET YOUR RED CROSS CERTIFICATION

    Get details here:

    https://www.firstaid4u.ca/en/course-info/workplace-standard-first-aid-cpr/

    or here:

    https://www.redcross.org/take-a-class/first-aid/first-aid-training/first-aid-certification

    You cannot responsibly hold and navigate transformational training spaces without a basic knowledge of first aid treatment in case of medical emergencies.

    12

    WRITE THE BOOK

    Just put it into your cells that you will one day write the book. It is not YOUR book. It is a book of your Archetypal Lineage.

    Providing the treasures of your Archetypal Lineage to the world as a way of upgrading Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware and evolving consciousness on Earth turns on Gaia, and it turns on your Archetypal Lineage...

    Can you imagine what your life would be like if both of these Sources were turned on about you?

    13

    KEEP DOING YOUR OTHER INITIATIONS

    Nobody can get initiated for you. More interestingly, nobody can stop you from getting initiated. There are so many additional authentic adulthood initiatory processes that are required to get your life and Archetypal Lineage turned on and flying. Once every two or three months figure out ways to do your next initiation. Many core initiations are listed online at http://goexplore.mystrikingly.com.

  •  

     

     

     

     

  • TRAINER FIELD NOTES

    ENERGY MANAGEMENT (OTHER PEOPLE MANAGING ENERGY)

    During an Expand The Box Training or a Possibility Lab, a Trainer is aware of what everybody in the room is doing with their energy. In particular, when during intense feeling processes, you may discover that some participants try to incorporate energy management they learned from other contexts, such as Rieke, Silva Mind control, etc...

    In particular, there are three things that they may be trying - conscious but mostly unconsciously -:

    1. Ground out the energy, get it out of the room.That is usually motivated by fear on their part and in attempt to protect themselves from being exposed to the energy. So they are trying to dispose of it.
    2. Call forth some angel or some protector or othe entity into the space in order to handle the situation or to protect it. They would be doing that under the disguise of blessing the person who the work is happening on.
    3. Handle the problem for someone else going through a process. Not letting the person handle it themselves but this other person may be trying to handle it for them. They might be doing this under the guise of blessing that person or healing them. They are putting their own energy into that person's space. They are invading their space which interferes with the person's process, preventing them from doing the work themselves.

    In the context of Possibility Management, each person on the Path do their own work; even the Trainer never does the work for their clients. In prison terminology, this is stated as, “You must do your own time.”

     

    As a Trainer, it is your job to pick up on these energy abnormalities or aberrations by maintaining awareness of energy throughout the Training. You sense in your bodies: where the energy is going, how much, what kind, and where it is coming from. You might notice that hands are in a certain position or doing motions, someone's attention being elsewhere or someone mumbling prayers to themselves. Immediately get their attention and ask them to 'Please stop' doing what they are doing and indicate to them if they have questions about your request, you can speak with them later about it.

     

    It is best not to bring this subject up at large. During the private conversation, ask the person to tell you what are they think they were doing. Either they will indicate to you that they know what they are doing and can describe it to you or they did not know what it is they are doing or they may not want to tell you. In any case, please let them know that people have to do their own work and in this context, you simply do not enter another person’s space energetically. It is rescuing.

    SHUT DOWN PARTICIPANTS (IDEAS FOR RELATING WITH THEM)

    There are many ways to work with shut down participants. Some of the ways proposed here are radical, and the invitation is to use them sparsely when the need for a radical move is clear.

     

    Recently we noticed that many people who join an Expand The Box Training have participated in Possibility Management work beforehand, usually a Rage Club, a Feelings Workshop, or a Fear Club. This means they already have had some practice in lowering their Numbness Bar and having access to their heart through experiencing and expressing Feelings and Emotions.

     

    When radically shut down, a participant shows up as profoundly separated, unable to connect or be authentic. The main idea to keep in mind is never to push anyone to feel anything. They will feel when they are ready to feel. Creating pressure to feel usually strenghten the Box from the inside.

     

    They are many reasons for such a profound shut down. It is useful to get an idea about what is the specific survival strategy that is causing the shut down:

    • Starting, with carrying Old Thoughtmaps about Feelings and Emotions
    • It can very simply be one or more Energetic Block(s).
    • It can be Old Decisions (possibly combined with Energetic Block(s)) about not being allowed or not wanting to feel ever again.
    • It can be a significant Contamination of their Adult Egostate with their Child, Gremlin or Parent Egostate. One of the indicators is the client's inability to feel the pain of the consequences they are creating in their Life. Their Being is so far hidden inside of them that you - as a Trainer - can barely have access to it. 
    • It can be a Grieving Process that has not taken place and that is blocking the flow of the Emotional Body
    • It can be Mixed Emotions, including Mixed Emotions in the physical body.
    • It can be that they were never born (Birth Process)
    • It can be that they are a carrier for a Demon
    • It can be expressing 'fake Emotions', copying what they have seen others do
    • It can be a violent Abuse, either physical, or sexual (both of which involve also energetic and emotional abuse)

    You might find yourself in a chicken and egg problem, because to take someone through the healing processes that they would need to unlock their emotional body, they need to be able to feel.

     

    This is why for most of them, it starts by being in a space where other people express high intensity authentic Feelings and Emotions can create the crack in their Box and in their heart sufficient for their dam to break or at least, for some part of their wall to fall apart.

     

    When sitting across from someone who is profoundly shut down, create a Vacuum instead of a Pressure. They are shut down probably because of the high intensity and high amount of pressure they have had to protect themselves from. As you create a large Vacuum, their survival strategy will have no place to work. Do not let yourself be hooked by their Gremlin, even for one moment at the risk of losing the safe space that you have created for them, instead gently redirect the focus on 'what is really going on for them?', and 'how is it to be them?', you are authentically curious, you really want to know.
