    Being a vacuum does not necessarily mean being silent, however it might. Being a Vacuum means to not give direct Feedback to or through the Box. Being a Vacuum means making space in the space of relating between you and your client in which your client falls into from their own willingness. It also includes painting territories and opening doors that the client might have never heard of before. You provide Clarity and Distinctions for their experience so that they can better inner navigate their own lives.

     

    The Feeling Cycle is one of the processees that uses low intensity feelings while providing huge amount of Clarity for the client about one their competence in feeling, even at 3-5-8% intensity, and the useful information that their feelings have for them. It is a gentle and at the same time, very powerful reality check for shut down participants.

     

    Nothing big needs to happen at first. There are no miracle cures for having been born and raised in a culture that is dedicated to crush the heart and soul of its citizens. Each territory reclaim is a victory to be celebrated. So celebrate them, celebrate with them.

    LEVERAGING YOURSELF

    When entering an Expand The Box Training, or a Possibility Lab, your job is to create something that does not yet exist. Nobody in an Expand The Box Training is holding space for Expand The Box Training but you.

     

    Every single one of your participants comes into Expand The Box from an Ordinary space, and their Box and Gremlin will mechanically do anything and everything to keep it like that. You are sitting across from 20-30-40-50 Boxes and Gremlins who will fight you tooth and nail to defend their status quo. What the hell are you doing here?!

     

    You are holding space for an Expand The Box Training because you have become someone who can Cavitate new culture space, in which you Declare an Extraordinary space of Healing, Transformation, Discovery, Research, Teambuilding and Love, enter the empty space and Hold space for it, while simultaneously keeping a Heart-to-Heart connection with every one of your participants as an open invitation into the space of Expand The Box Training and holding your Sword of Clarity at the throat of their Box and Gremlin without breaking into a sweat. These are 101 skills for an Expand The Box Trainer.

     

    On top of that, you are landing Distinctions, painting Possibilities, opening sideways Doors, drawing Maps, ongoing scanning the 5-body of your participants, splitting your attention between what is needed right now and where to roll the energy next, keeping Integrity with Time, and the Matrix of your participants, and, from time to time, cracking jokes (never, however, at the expense of anyone inside or outside the space).

     

    If you attempt to source all of this from your own energy, you will end up completely wiped out. You would probably get sick, have headaches, muscle aches or get tense. If that is happening for you, you are not leveraging yourself and the Training by empowering the others in the space so that you can be also nourished along with everybody else. From personal experience, for many years, I lived in the story that I (Anne-Chloé), as a Trainer, needed to 'work hard' and show for it only to prove that the Training was successful. I would exit Expand The Box Training with intense sciaticas (inflammation of the sciatic nerve). I do not recommend it.

    In addition, it is tremendously value for your participants to witness the ecstasy of a Flying Human Being.

     

    Here are some pointers for how to leverage your energy.

     

    1. You do not delivering Expand The Box Trainings.

    If you - meaning as whatever you think 'you' are - hold space, it is your mind that is delivering the Training. You are following a plan, the 'rules', your fantasy world about how it is supposed to go or look like, you are copying what you think is the 'right way'. You are rigidly defending 'your' self from all side, and probably end up snapping back at participants who are behaving ways that are outside of the curriculum, like a teacher.

     

    Trying to keep 'your' 'self' up and deliver Expand The Box Training is like wanting to eat an egg while denying the imperative to break the shell. The opposing forces at war inside of yourself will immediately collapse the Training space into an Ordinary war zone between you and your participants.

     

    What is more is that you are using your own personal energy, mostly your physical and intellectual body energy. Your Being comes out exhausted. Your Box and Gremlin might come out frustated but righteous.

     

    The shift is: how fast can you get out of the way for your Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage to move in and take over sourcing the Training? What is in the way of that? What experiments are you doing for that process to take place as instantaneously as possible?

     

    2. Expand The Box starts in Archiarchy. It does not start in Patriarchy.

    Expand The Box starts in an Extraordinary context. It does not start in Ordinary.

     

    With these two distinctions, you already leveraging yourself out of having to change your participants' behaviours. You are holding a space in which their survival strategies do not work, and in which their incompetence to function in an Extraordinary space sticks out like a sore thumb. With each Map and Exercise, you are answering the question they cannot ask (yet!): what do I need to thrive in an Extraordinary space?

     

    Keeping it real, in an five day Expand The Box Training, the first day and half are tough. As the Trainer, you are alone. You carry the space, and push through your participants' resistance to surrender to their Liquid States. It usually is so until the first opportunity for expressing higher intensity feelings such as Emotional Healing Processes, Unmixing Emotions or Standing Rage. When the walls are down, you might experience the space to be 'easier', it flies, it moves. What is happening is that the participants are taking more and more responsibility for their Liquid State. They are no longer fighting them, and might even start to enjoy them. Their resistance to leaving the flat ordinary map of the world is diminishing.

     

    What happens simultaneously is the internalised interpersonal hierarchiers between the participants (who is low status? who is high status?) are leveled. How can you compare your self to other self when 'you' and 'they' are no longer there? Finally, the participants start authentically connecting, and providing their Nonmaterial Value to each other.

     

    Due to the pretty much set-designed schedule of an Expand The Box Training, this is often as far as you can leverage yourself and as far as the participants can go to empower the space.

     

    An Expand The Box Training is a labyrinth, your main job remains to keep the group moving so that you are out of the maze on Sunday night.

     

    3. Leveraging yourself through the nights.

     

    The nights are an integral part of an Expand The Box Training or a Possibility Lab. The nights are the longest integration periods during a 4-to-5-day Training. Both Expand The Box and Labs are extremely intense Trainings, they are intense in all three worlds: Middle world, Upperworld and Underworld, in all five bodies, for the Box, the Gremlin and the Being. When participants go to bed, you have imparted them with an immense amount of energy that they will carry it into their sleep, their dreams, their subconscious and their bodies throughout the entire evening, night time and morning. The intensity is working them over. By morning, you have leveraged yourself with everybody all night long. Who your people were before going to bed is not who they are in the morning. There is incredible expansion of what is possible for everybody.

     

    Your job as a Trainer is to hold no expectation that who you said 'Good night' to is the same person who walks in the Training space the next morning.

     

    -----------------------------------------------------------

     

    A Possibility Lab is a entirely different Universe also in regards to energy management, and leveraging yourself. There is no labyrinth in a Possibility Lab, it is a giant open space of Possibility and High Level Fun. (I would add to the exception of specialty Labs, such as Heal From School, for which there is a form of a design).

     

    In a Possibility Lab, probably the main possibility to leverage yourself is to invoke, call forth and skill up each of your participant as Possibility Managers. The main proposal is a radical Shift of Identity from their Survival Strategy to Possibility Managers. By keeping that door open during the entire Training (and why not even after the end of the Training?), you empower each individual to jack-into their Infinite inner and outer Resources that they know nothing about. By empowering every single individual within the Training, you are leveraging yourself. You, now, can, not only rely on your Bright Principles, and Archetypal Lineage and the space of the Possibility Lab, but you start relying on each of your participant to be a space through which their resources do their work in the space.

     

    You are walking a tight rope. Any participant who join you in sourcing the space can feel the tightness of the rope you and they are walking together. Too much control, and the Forces in the space freeze for lack of freedom of movement to create what is wanted and needed. Too much lightness, and the bigger Gremlin will jump at the first opportunity to take down the space (into a complaining, witch hunting, competing, creating intrigue, etc...).

     

    In a Possibility Lab, it is unreasonable to think (even worse to expect!) that your participants can be radically responsible for their Gremlin. You are the main spaceholder, it is your job to keep the space safe of unconscious Gremlin and dangerous enough for transformation.

     

    If you can walk to tight rope, there is a good chance that you can take your participants into a functionning space where you become a Navigator of Navigators.

    BEING A NAVIGATOR

    As the Navigator of Navigators, you hang back. Participants start to source the Extraordinary, possibly the Archetypal, space themselves. They ask for Emotional Healing Processes, they Quest-ions each other, they request what they want and need and build the space for it to happen (in or outside of the 'official' sessions), they design their own experiements, and ask for Possibility to each other, figuring things out.

     

    You hang at the perimeter of the space, coming in as needed to keep the Training on track.

     

    You are no longer the only Source for the Training, each participant is empowered to become to Source of the Training.

     

    This is one of the biggest shift that a Trainer looks for: the participants' shift from being a consumer of an Extraordinary space to being the Source of an Extraordinary space. Each of your participants takes home the sensation in their Being of their ability to be at cause of the kind of Clarity, Wisdom, Instinct, Passion, Wise Innocence and Love they are capable of as an Adult Woman or Man. It becomes a reference point for Something Completely Different From This (i.e. Ordinary) Is Possible Right Now.

     

    It is at best useless, at worst harmful to bring up this conversation. At best, the idea that they might be able to source parts of the space will only go in their mind from which place they can do nothing. At worst, you will have activated the hyper adaptiveness of your participants who then behave in ways that could be comparable to a shift of identity of Possibility Manager, but it is fake. If you think this is Extraordinary, you are fooling yourself. It is manipulation on your part.

     

    When the shift of identity happens, your participants can feel it. Being the Source of an Extraordinary space is no longer a concept, they now have a physical reference point: hours of experience during which time they showed up in a way that they never knew they were capable of before.

     

    At this point, your main task is to step back, let go of any neurotic need to micromanage your participants transformational process, the quality of their Possibility, or the outcome of an Initiation. The experience of sourcing an Extraordinary trumps the elegance in which an Emotional Healing Process is held.

     

    This might very well be the start of their Possibilitator path. Archiarchy thrives when people takes their place in Archiarchy. In other words, when your participants deliver their Nonmaterial Value to their Circle, Archiarchy comes alive.

     

    In terms of energy management, the space is flying. The tolerance to transformational intensity increased exponentially. The participants start to radically rely on Forces bigger than themselves and bigger than you as the Trainer. You leave the center of attention. Participants are less inclined to give you their center or to please you. You fade into the background of Forces of Nature. This gives space for tremendously rich, nourishing spaces of deep healing, connectedness that are delicate and rare experiences in the domain of being human.

     

    By the end of the Training evening, you are receiving so much from the richness of the spaces that the opposite of exhaustion occurs. It is fulfilling, ecstatic, almost blissful. Energetically, you are still the source person for the overall Training but you are no longer using your own energy. You are being tremendously fed and nourished by what goes on.

    HOLDING SPACE FOR AN ATHANOR

    An Athanor is a furnace used to provide a constant heat for alchemical digestion. The furnace must be solid and capable of tolerating high heat energy without weakening or cracking or crumbling, without letting anything in.

     

    Holding space for an Athanor at an energetic level is made by declaring at least 3 golden cubes of work space: around the Training space itself, around the entire building in which the Training takes place, and around the physical limits of the property. In addition, you might want to declare an addition stainless steel protection (in a form of a donut), especially around the training space and the physical building. The stainless steel protection is declared with your intention and your clicker. People often keep energetic entities hanging around them for a reason or another. These entities are waiting around to feed on juicy space such as Expand The Box or Lab. The stainless steel protection keep these things away and out of the space.

     

    The golden cubes and protection layer are no replacement for you evoking the qualities necessary for the furnace to safely burn without being attacked from outside (or inside).

     

    Clinton writes: "There was one Training that had been incredibly rich and powerful. On Sunday evening, right at the end of the closing circle, I am celebrating that we have accomplished all the closing processes and the training is coming to an end. Everything is done and complete. I say 'Good night'. At that point, I put my sword back into its sheathe (a thing that I have learned never to do again! Why ever put your sword back into your sheathe? There is not one good reason to do so!). So, as I am backing down from holding the space in a certain way, a huge energetic entity comes out of one of the participants. It starts feeding on the space, pulling the New Age BS of 'Blessing the planet. Let’s heal everybody.' It took me 15 or 20 seconds before I pulled my sword out again and stopped it. As the Trainer, you are energetically sourcing and holding the space for the Training from the moment you make the invitation to the Training public until the last person leaves the room and you have closed the door and you vanish all the energy from the Training with a black hole. Remember that."

    JUICING UP

    A Trainer is able to Juice Up.

     

    Regardless of what is going on in your personal life - whether you have a fever, a headache, a pain in his back, a problem with your wife or children, a problem with your boss, a problem with your coworkers. Whatever is going on, you are responsible for cavitating, holding, and navigating the Extraordinary and Archetypal space of the Training.

     

    You make the shift between being a victim of your personal circumstances to be a Trainer by getting off whatever you think your problem is, by dropping your position, completely and absolutely. You do not keep even 1% of backdoor into your "problems".

     

    You might discover that when you make that shift, it is a permanent shift. Whatever situation was going on before the shift occurs disappears because of the shift. The situation that was going on previous to this shift was no more or less authentic than what was going on after the shift. It is just different. One situation empowers you as a Trainer and one situation disempowers you.

     

    It is your responsibility to empower yourself by making this shift, whenever or where ever it is needed.

     

    However, this does not mean that you does not engage personal problems (outside of the Training) or never request an Emotional Healing Process during the Training. You do. You make use of the space of Transformation for your own Transformation. However, your "problems" can not be brought forth as an excuse for the quality of the space.

     

    The process of Juicing Up is very simple: you energetically pull out your Sword of Clarity. When you have your sword in hand, you are ready. You shift from being not ready to being ready. That is called Juicing Up. In Martial Arts, it is a standard technique of centering. You locate who you are or where you are coming from in you, rather than having your attention distracted or attracted by anything outside of you.

     

    It is the opposite of being adaptive. It is adapting to nothing and withholding nothing. You are Present in a small HERE, small NOW, small YOU, small THEM.

     

    A Trainer needs to be able to do so instantaneously.

     

    You might consider the Possibility that you could be Juiced Up all the time. You are either sleeping or juiced up, sleeping or alive, sleeping or centered, sleeping or being present and at attention.

     

    This doesn't mean that you are numb. You are hypersensitive.

    This doesn't mean that you are invulnerable. You are total transparent and vulnerable.

     

    Without the ability to juice up, and hang out in that state and function in that state, you cannot be a Trainer.

    Without the ability to sense if another person is Juiced up, a Trainer cannot train other Trainers.

  • SKILLS & DISTINCTIONS

    Skills needed to deliver Expand The Box Training and Possibility Labs

    (Still in progress)

    EXPAND THE BOX TRAINER SKILLS (see also: expandthebox.mystrikingly.com)

    1. DISTINGUISH BETWEEN TYPE 1 AND TYPE 2 GREMLIN: you are clear on the distinction between Gremlin Type 1 and Gremlin Type 2; you notice who of your participants has which Gremlin type in your space; you provide different practices and open different doors for the transformation of Gremlin Type 1 and Gremlin Type 2 into an initiated Gremlin.
    2. SELF-CANNIBALISM GREMLIN: you are clear on the symptoms of a Self-Cannibalist Gremlin; you can land instructions for how to transform a self-cannibalist Gremlin through Gremlin Transformation.
    3. DECONTAMINATION OF THE ADULT EGOSTATE: you have clarity on the signs of an Adult Egostate contaminated with Gremlin, Child, Parent or Demon Egostate; you can give a very clear description of the symptoms to your participants as well as the reasons for contamination; you can land clear instructions for the 1-to-2-year Decontamination Process in the company of a Decontamination coach.
    4. TRIGGER SENTENCES: you notice the signs of someone's energy being sucked dried by Trigger Sentence; you can distill the sentences with them; you can provide the clear instructions for a shift of identity between being hunted and Being a Hunter; you know which SPARK outlines the process for Closing the Café (SPARK 135).
    5. MIXED EMOTIONS: you know at least 7 different ways to Unmix Emotions; you can distinguish between Emotions that are Mixed in the Heart and/or Mixed in the Physical Body, you can distinguish between Mixed Emotions or Emotions layered on top of each other; you can navigate to the cause of the Mixing Emotions and provide Possibility for your participant to have access to their Pure Clean Feelings; you can hold space for radically clean and unequivocable Unmixing Emotion Process; you are clear on the Resonant Tissue in which to flow each Feeling. In addition, you have read the Unmix Emotions website.
    6. FEELING CYCLE: you have experienced the Feeling Cycle (bright side) and your Emotional Cycle (shadow side); you can deliver the Feeling Cycle; you can use the Feelings Cycle for Unmixing Emotions, bringing people into Presence, and demonstrating their natural competence in their ability to feel.
    7. GUILT & OTHER CONCEPTS: you are clear that the concept of Guilt is a modern-culture-man-made concept for citizen to give their authority and agency away; you can give clear instructions and land distinctions for your client to create a gap between them and their Guilt. This also applies to other concept such as Family, Friendship, Relationship, or Marriage which creates a litany of Mixed Emotions that people use to control and manipulate themselves and others. You have read SPARK 120.
    8. UNHOOKABILITY FROM ADAPTIVE SURVIVAL STRATEGIES: you are unhookable in the face of adaptive survival strategies; you unquestionnably refuse to take anyone center; you especially builds a sensitivity to the adaptiveness to being a 'good Possibility Manager' or 'good Possibilitator'.
    9. NONLINEAR ALTERNATIVE STORYWORLDS: you can propose ten nonlinear storyworlds alternative to your client's storyworld.
    10. SPEAK CLEAR DISTINCTIONS INTO AN EXPERIENCE: you can clearly speak of the inner experience of a participant using Archiarchal Distinctions so that your participant gain a whole new level of clarity and navigational possibility for their life.  
    11. SPEAK FROM THE UNKNOWN: you can speak about things that have never been spoken before; you can speak about thing that you do not know about with authority and clarity (this implies that you have Healed From School to a certain degree)
    12. NAVIGATE TO PAIN, NOT TO SUFFERING: you can navigate your participant to their biggest pain, without any stories attached. A religious context navigates to suffering, so participants 'pay' for their sin to access heaven. A Possibility context uses storyless pain (Feelings and Emotions) as cathexis energy for Transformation.
    13. INCLUDE DENYING FORCES: you can detect denying forces in the participants, and include them as part of the Training, so that the denying forces do not need to come from the outside.
    14. HOW FAR TO TAKE PEOPLE: an Expand The Box Training goes all the way to "There are only two things in life: Bullshit and Nothing". You ongoingly check to take people right to their edges but never too far that the Training is unsustainable for their 5-bodies. You walk the razor's edge.
    15. DELIVER THOUGHTMAPS FROM THE SOURCE: you can jack into the source of any of the Expand The Box thoughtmaps, you rediscover each map anew as you deliver them.

    POSSIBILITY LAB TRAINER SKILLS (also see: possibilitylabs.mystrikingly.com and possibilitylabtrainer.mystrikingly.com)

    1. DETECT INNER STRUCTURE: you can detect the quality and elegance of your participant's inner structure: its absence, its weaknesses, how twisted it is, etc... and can provide clear distinctions, processes, and practices to build a more elegance and effective inner structure.
    2. FANTASY WORLDS: you can notice when someone's Emotions or Reactivity is triggered by one of their Fantasy Worlds; you can define what a fantasy world is; you are clear on what holds fantasy worlds together and what is needed to dismantling fantasy worlds (with the permission of your client, of course).
    3. RELIGIONSHIP: you can take someone of the journey of their relationship construct, otherwise known as Religionship; you can notice the assumptions, expectations and resentment, the Child Egostate fantasy worlds and contaminations, as well as the memetic constructs that shape their religionship.
    4. MEMETIC CONSTRUCTS: you can sense in your 5-body Memetic Constructs; you have developed Memetic Engineering skills: the technology for the detection, creation, transformation, and application of memes.
    5. ARCHIARCHAL INITIATIONS: you can invent and navigate authentic Adulthood and Archetypal Initiatory Processes, also from the bigger picture.
    6. NAVIGATE LONG TERM TRANSFORMATION ON THE PATH: meaning, longer than one Lab; you can scan for which of the 8 Prisons a participant has not escaped from.
    7. JACKED-IN THE CONTEXT OF POSSIBILITY: you can consistently source the next space, which ever Possibility is needed, even if you have never been there before.
    8. SCAN FOR DOORWAYS: you can scan for possible doorways for your participants and the space, how close they are and what steps are needed to get there; you know when you have opened three doors and they have not gone through, and stop, and not rescue.
    9. LISTENING WITH FREE ATTENTION: you have built enough free attention to listen to the Archetypal Forces for what they are offering to the space.
    10. SHIELDING THE LAB SPACE from "Dark Forces", Energetic vampires and other entities pretending to be helpful servants.
    11. SELF-SUGERY: you have personally experienced self-surgeries such as Mind Machines, Brain Splits, E-Body Retrieval, Re-wire Thoughtware, Memetic Surgery to escape Prison-Construct.
    12. FLOOR PROCESSES: you have personally experiences all 13 floor processes.
    13. DELIVERING SUCESSFUL EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESS: you have had the opportunity delivered at least 6 Emotional Healing Processes in one day; you have developed an asburdly effective skill level for Emotional Healing Processes.
    14. VACUUM LEARNING: you are highly skilled in Vacuum Rapid Learning, confronting with authentically curious questions that opens a space of inquiry and research for both your participants and yourself.
    15. INVOKING THE BEING: you ongoingly engage with the Being / the Adult Egostate of your participants; you converse with the potential of your participants without ever expecting them to step into it.
    16. COACH YOUR ORGANIZERS: you can coach with encouragement and clarity the organizers of your Expand The Box Training or Possibility Lab without hindering the quality or quantity of your Training and without rescuing your organizers.

    TRAINER-TRAINING SKILLS (also see: magetraining.mystrikingly.com and becomemagic.mystrikingly.com)

    1. BEING A GLOBAL GAMEWORLD BUILDER: a Trainer-Trainer is ultimately a Trainer-Trainer-Trainer; you can design and re-design the structure of a global gameworld so that the Trainer Training (at any level) never stops even after you are dead; you design for your own demise.
    2. BEING A GUARDIAN: you have developed the skills and the context of guardianship for an Evolutionary Archiarchal Gameworld, meaning as a Guardian you do not hinder the Evolution of the gameworld but support it by holding space for deepening the context; you understand that the context protects itself, the more you protect the context, the more the context protects the Integrity and Clarity of the gameworld.
    3. BEING AN EVOLUTIONARY: you have developed an extreme sensitivity to Emotional Reactivity and are intolerant in letting any Emotional Reactivity slide without raising The Purple Card; being an Global Gameworld Evolutionary also means that you are an explorer of unknown territories that would serve the Trainer Path, you can take the whole Trainer Path with you there, in the Unknown.
    4. BEING A VILLAGE WEAVER: you have developed skills to weave the Trainers within the gameworld of the Trainer Path: you establish Circles within Circles where competition for clients/participants is abandonned in favor of Creative Collaboration for what is wanted/needed for the participants/clients, as well as as weaving the Trainer Path with other gameworlds: you introduce Trainer Pathers to other global transformational players, you invite Trainer Pathers to global events, etc...
    5. HAVING REPLACED YOURSELF IN YOUR LAST THREE JOBS/ROLES: replacing yourself is a cornerstone of an Evolutionary Archan Gameworld. Prove that you can play at that level.
    6. HAVING OPEN A WHOLE NEW REGION OR COUNTRY TO POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT: you are clear on the steps needed to open a new country to Possibility Management: you have the clarity about what it takes to create an Expand The Box Training, or Possibility Lab, you can have reality-grounded conversations about 'selling' Transformational Trainings.
    7. WALK THE TIGHT ROPE: you can walk the tight rope of guarding the context of the Trainer Path gameworld while having the flexibility for 'imperfect' (meaning everyone) Trainer to take a leap and deliver Expand The Box or Possibility; you can distinguish between a harmful rescuing of someone who is not yet a Trainer and radically relying on E.C.C.O. for the next generations of Expand The Box Trainers.

  •  

     

     

     

     

     

     

     

     

  • EXPERIMENTS FOR TRAINER PATHERS

    A Trainer is someone who can create real results for someone else.

    Can you? Prove it.

    Do each of these experiments and create real results for the people in Your Circle.

    WRITE (ONLY!) WITH THE TRAINER ALPHABET

    TRNRPATH.01

    Experiments in the Trainer Path are simple but almost never easy. This experiment is simple AND easy! Yay!

     

    That's why we put it first! We wanted to give you a gentle start.

     

    Right now, (ideally right now or when you can make 15 to 20 minutes of time for your Path), go to the Trainer Alphabet's website, then open your Beep! Book at an empty page, and write one line of A using the Trainer Alphabet's form.

    A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A

    then, do the next line with Bs

    B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B B

    then, do the next line with Cs
    C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C C

     

    I think you get the picture.

    Write one line minimum per letter.

    If this triggers memories of punishment from school, you know what to do: write it down as a gateway for your next Emotional Healing Process in the back of your Beep! Book, which you already have in your hand. Then, GO THROUGH THE PROCESS. I am not kidding, even if it takes only 10 to 15 minutes to Complete a Incomplete Emotion or a Boundary. DO IT. It will be one less emotional knot to carry as part of your Baggage.

     

    Human beings are capable of developing very quickly muscle memory. This is why I can type on my keyboard without looking at the letters. This is why you can drive your car in the sleeping state. This is why factory line work is so efficient. Your mind can be bend to learn and repeat a task without thinking.

     

    Writing in the Trainer Alphabet is developing a new muscle memory so that when you are cavitating, holding and navigating space while delivering maps during an Expand The Box Training, you do not have to think 'How do I make the A so that it is the most efficient and fastest way?'!!

     

    After writing all 26 letter lines, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    MAKE YOUR LIFE OF LEARNING IN ARCHIARCHY PUBLICLY VISIBLE

    TRNRPATH.02

    It has been heard from some Apprentice Trainers that it is easier to be a Trainer then to become one. Therein lie the assumption that you can be a Trainer who stops becoming one. If you ever meet a Trainer who is no longer becoming a Trainer, it is simple, they are no longer an Active Trainer, they are an 'Inactive' retired Trainer.

     

    Being a Trainer is being on the front line of the emergence of Archiarchy. Archiarchy is already here, and by definition as Archiarchy is an Evolutionary Culture it will keep emerging. Being a Trainer is making the edge of Archiarchy your home. A place where you come alive, and bring other people to be alive with you there.

     

    Living on the front line is being in Love with discovering what you do not yet know, and what you do not know that you do not know about, AND being there with the people from Your Circle. An integral part of the Life of Learning for a Trainer is to ongoingly document and share by any means necessary your learnings at the edge of Archiarchy. You are no longer experimenting for just yourself.

     

    The experiment to enter your Trainer's Life of Learning is, for the next two weeks, to live in a Metaconversation. The Metaconversation is about how you are emerging Archiarchy right now; how you are living Archiarchy right now; and how you are protecting yourself from making the edge of Archiarchy your home.

     

    For example,

    * You have stop wearing any clothing that carry a visible brand name, therefore refusing to being a walking advertisement for suicidale psychopathic-run corporations.

    * You can fix most mechanically broke objects around you: you can sew back a ripped piece of clothing and replace button on a shirt, you can glue back (Possibilitator) books together (and send them to the next person in a package without plastic), you can change the oil in an car and replace a flat tyre, ...

    * You store your grains, beans, dry seeds, dry fruits, herbs and teas in reclycled glass jar containers from the supermarket, because you know the real value behind a blown glass artefact.

    * You replace, complete and fix what is old, missing, and broken in the house that you visit and rent, because in that moment, it is your house and you are the Guardian of it. For example, you throw out any Teflon pots and pans and replace them with stainless steel or enamel ware.

    * You are in the Service of the people in Service to you (waiters, taxi drivers, train drivers, rubbish collectors, road fixers, market vendors, bakers etc...), without their sacrifice their life to be in service to you, you could not do what you need to do. You Radically Relate to them as Human Being and not slave of the Patriarchy.

    * You carry physical doorways to Archiarchy: postcards, books, flyers, you give them away as fast as you can to the people who bump into you.

    * You flow resources, including money, to edgeworking gameworld who are doing the work that you cannot do: Kiva, Seasheperd, Deep Green Resistance, Savory Institut, Global Ecovillage Network.

    * You carry your own stainless steel (or anything else than plastic) cups, straw, and your self-made chopsticks. You ask for your coffee to go in your own cup, you eat spaghetti with your own chopsticks, you firmly refuse ANY straw (plastic but even paper and compostable ones) in the moment you order your drink (and not after, after is too late).

    * You shop in local street markets and package-free shops with your own clothe bags and glass jars. You refuse ANY plastic bags, and complain abundantly to supermarkets and at markets about the insane amount of plastic packaging. If you are in a foreign country in which you do not speak the language, a firm and repeatedly 'No plastic!' is understood by almost everyone. If not, simply give back the plastic bag.

    * Everytime you go to the local market, you buy a fruit or a vegetable that you have never tried before, and eat it. OR, look fo an eatable that you do not like but you know your neighbor relishes in, buy it for them and deliver it to their doorstep.

    * You grow 2 or 3 different kinds of vegetable in your garden instead of keeping a lawn. It does not need to be a big garden, simply that you have regain your agency in providing physical food for yourself. This extends to having a ongoing flow of sprouts available in your kitchen, that you include in your regular diet.

    * You demonstrate publicly, even if only to your neighbors, Archiarchal behaviours centered on providing Nonmaterial Value to your community. For example, you deliver Emotional Healing Processes in your home or, once a week, sit outside of your house and offer The Menu to your people, or, open your home for the children in the neighborhoods to come and help you with your garden or building their own wooden fort.

    * You take out plastic pacifiers outside of children's mouth. You refuse to raise the next generation of zombies.

    * ...

     

    The list goes on.

    This experiment includes making your own list of how you are visibly emerging and living Archiarchy.

    Make your list public: write your list (beautifully) on a wooden or card board, place the board in front of your house with an open invitation to come talk to you about these things.

    AND, give a worktalk about 'Your Life In Archiarchy'.

     

    After launching your Life of Learning by mainting a Metaconversation about your Life in Archiarchy for two weeks AND making your Life in Archiarchy visible (public list and a worktalk), please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

    VIDEOLOG YOUR TRAINER'S LIFE OF PRACTICE

    TRNRPATH.03

    Nobody can practice for you. However, nobody can stop you from practicing. Remember that, even your mother, even people who do not understand you, even people who hate you or love you. Nobody can stop you from practicing.

     

    Evolution is reflexive. The more matrix you build, the more awareness you can catch, the more Clarity you have, the more Responsibility you can take, the more Possibility you can create. How do you build matrix? One of the most effective ways to build matrix is practicing.

     

    There is a difference between practicing and creating for yourself a Life of Practice as a Trainer. Engaging in a Life of Practice is a shift of Identity. It means, you choose to practice. You do not practice because it is written on this website, or so that you can be a 'good student' on the Trainer Path, or because someone opened a door for you for such practice. You practice because practicing is what you are. You are a researcher who is eager to find the results of their own self-chosen experiments.

     

    The experiment is, for 2 full weeks, cavitate and hold an extra Archiarchal Bubble of Culture space which purpose is to live a Life Of Practice. In each space that you move into, day after day, you keep 5% of your attention on your Life of Practice. Practicing is engaging in any behaviour that is orthogonal to the Ordinary space. Practicing does not have to be loud, however, it might be. Practicing does not have to be visible, however, it might be.

     

    During the 2 weeks, keep a video journal or a podcast, for example called 'My Life of Practice' or 'Becoming A Possibility Trainer'. Each day, this means you at least shoot 14 videos, make a 3-to-5 minute video about your Life of Practice and your discovery.

     

    After publishing all 14 videos publicly, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

    STUDY 'BEING A TRAINER' WITH OTHER TRAINERS FROM THE POINT OF VIEW OF BEING A TRAINER

    TRNRPATH.04

    The first item of 64 in 'How Do We Know That You Are A Trainer' is COMMIT TO THE TRAINER PATH.

     

    You will quickly find yourself in a conundrum because you might want to commit to the Trainer Path or you might even declare that you are committed to the Trainer Path, but neither wanting or declaring has anything to do with committing. Commitment cannot be willed. It does not matter how big a tantrum you can throw, how sweet you can be, how clever you think you are, or how effective you were told you were, commitment does not happen by force.

     

    Commitment is the transformation of the shape of your Being to the degree that you become the thing that is committed. When you are committed, the Universe can finally commit to your commitment. What you are committed to happens, and the rest of life falls aside.

     

    For example, if you are committed to making enough money to survive, isn't obvious that everything else falls aside so that you can make enough money to survive? Nourrishing connection, a well-fed soul, 5-body intimacy adventures, writing The book, etc...

     

    So, how do you become something that is Committed to the Trainer Path?

     

    One of the first steps is to commit to become the thing that will be committed to the Trainer Path. This preliminary committment (your commitment to become someone who is committed to the Trainer Path) opens doors for practical experiments.

     

    The experiment is to deepen your understanding in five bodies of what is a Trainer. Indeed, how can you commit to something if you do not know what you are committing to?

     

    Read entirely the website 'Being A Trainer', ideally with a Team of Trainers/Apprentice Trainers or at least of Possibilitators who have an inclination to study what is being a Trainer. Read it slowly, out loud. Stop any time anyone has a question, a comment, a Feeling, an Emotion reaction or is making an Assumption, or does not understand what is means.

     

    Before starting to read the website together, make sure that you are centered, grounded, bubbled, then lower your numbness bar, and enter a space where the purpose is not to 'look good' but to deepen your context of what is Being A Trainer.

     

    Along the way, keep your Beep! Book close, write down your discoveries, your questions, as well as all the justifications, reasons, constructs, voices, emotional reactivity that are blocking you from committing, to the Trainer Path, yes, but in reality, committing at all.

     

    This experiment could take weeks. Let it be weeks. This experiment is not meant for you to learn something new, but to become something else.

     

    After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

    WRITE AND PUBLISH TRAINER PATH STORY

    TRNRPATH.05

    Much as been written and discussed about the 'Path' over the past thousands of years. You might have discovered by now that you cannot teach anything that a person is not ready to learn themselves. This applies to you too. You cannot learn anything from anyone that you are not ready to learn for yourself. This pertains to the question: what is the Path? It is the same question as in the previous experiment: how can you commit to the Trainer Path, if you do not know what the Path is.

     

    Probably, your school did not teach you about the Evolutionary Path, your parents did not tell you about the Path, none of your friends from childhood and their parents had any idea what the Evolutionary Path is. You did not had the chance to deeply think about what the Path is.

     

    This is your chance to do so.

     

    The experiment is to write a short story, at least 15 pages long about a young woman who discovers The Path of Evolution. The story is about her moment of discovery, but also about how her walking the Path unfolds, who does she becoming and what new results she is able to create. You have complete freedom of movement: it can be set in the future, in the past, on another Planet; she has friends, allies, mentors, teachers, pets, a lover; she finds another group of edgeworkers, or has to build her own Team; ... The main requirement is that the book is centered on her discovering that there is a number of specialty that make up Archiarchy, and one of them is Trainer. She discovers she is a Trainer, and start delivering her Nonmaterial Trainer Value.

     

    Publish the short story, either in full or in parts at Medium or at another platform for articles; include a cover picture with your story.

     

    #1 Extra experiment: draw the cover picture yourself.

     

    #2 Extra experiment: after writing and publishing your story, enter a counting contest (or an open mic, etc...) and read your story or parts of your story out loud to the public.

     

    After writing and publishing your Trainer Path short story, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

    WHAT CAN YOUR FELLOW TRAINE PATHER CAN DEPEND ON YOU FOR? BECOME A TRANSFORMATIONAL PROPOPOSAL MAKER

    TRNRPATH.06

    An easily mesurable shift of behavior is when you become some who can source something that until now you have been only consuming. The shift from consumer to spaceholder is not a once-in-a-lifetime initiation. It is an ongoing feedback mechanism on your Path.

     

    Most people are on a Team so that they can let someone else do the work of holding and navigating space, they expect to be taken care of and entertained, while assuring themselves an ongoing source of support and possibility. Being on a Team as a Trainer is measured by who are you being and what are you doing to be a source of the Team's ecstasy.

     

    How well can you be on a Trainer Team as a Trainer? How are you sourcing the Trainer Path? How are you still consuming it?

     

    Another way to put it is: What can your fellow Trainer Pathers can depend on your for within the Trainer Path?

    Can they depend on you to be your survival self? Can they depend on you to withdraw and withhold, not speak up when it is your line in the script and even when it is not? Can they depend on you to keep Voices in your head? Can they depend on you to play low status and give up on taking responsibility for the quality and elegance of the Trainer Path because 'somebody else will take care of it'? Can they depend on you to find excuses and justifications for not taking yourself into breakdown into a place of not knowing?

     

    This experiment comes in two parts.

     

    The first part is to get your 'X' on the map about your dependability on the Trainer Path. In the next meeting of the Trainer Path, start the meeting by asking your fellow Trainers: 'What can you depend on me for here in the Trainer Path?' Write down everything they say, even if you do not understand, especially if you do not understand. Be explicit that you are wanting a Radically Honest answer of what you source in the Trainer Path from an Upperworld, Middle world and Underworld perspective.

     

    The second part is about practicing making Transformational Proposals in the Trainer Path. For the next 13 meetings, in each meeting, make at least one Transformational Proposals to create the Trainer Path that your Trainer Being wants to be part of. Transformational Proposals can range from a 5 minutes experiment, to a meeting-long space, to a redesign of the entire gameworld.

     

    Transformational proposals are, for example:

    * Create and hold space for a new specialty (or an already existing specialty without a spaceholder) of the Possibilitator Training.

    * Invite a true global Initiator to join the Trainer Path to offer their Nonmaterial Value. If you have to pay for them to come, organize that too.

    * Engage the Trainer Path in updating and upgrading the Trainer Path Handbook.

    * Take a stand to invoke what is not been said in the space by calling forth the people who are not speaking it to take center stage.

    * Become a Map for someone to take themselves into breakdown by pulling the rug out from under yourself.

    * Change your identity is being a Quest-ion Quality Detective. You discover that the space can only be as Extraordinary as the Quest-ions in the space are. You ongoingly scan for the depth and quality of the Quest-ion in the Trainer Path.

    * Make Possibility Management Possibilitator Training / Trainer Path postcard, and send 200 postcards to each member of the Trainer Path.

    * Design a Possibility Trainer T-shirt, and send one to each of the member of the Trainer Path.

    * Be an Documenter Fanatic: ask, request, require, demand of your fellow Trainer Path colleagues to document their findings. Do whatever you can for them to share their discover through video, talks, article, books, video log. Make Pirate Agreement, call them up on Zoom and record while they speak, ask them for one paragraph of writing every day for one week, ...

    * I could keep going...

     

    These are my (Anne-Chloé) Transformational Proposals, this is what would turn me on. What turns your Trainer Being on? Figure out what Transformational Proposals would make that happen, and make them, over and over again.

     

    After making Transformational Proposals for 13 weeks in the Trainer Path, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 13 Matrix Points.

    PRINT THE 'PRACTICE EXPAND THE BOX' WEBSITE AND STUDY IT AS A HANDBOOK

    TRNRPATH.07

    If there is a Handbook about how to become certified to deliver Expand The Box Trainings, it is the Practice Expand The Box website.

     

    It has the steps.

    It has the logistics.

    It has 99 shift-processes for you to go through.

     

    Here is the experiment: print and bind nicely the Practice Expand The Box website, carry it with you as your personal Handbook for preparing yourself to deliver your Practice Practice Expand The Box Training and/or your Practice Expand The Box Training.

     

    As you read through the printed version, make notes of the results of your experiments in the margins, highlights the part that are crucial Liquid States for you to go through, ... The proposal is make the Practice Expand The Box Handbook your Handbook, bring it to Life.

     

    Extra experiment: after your successful Practice Expand The Box, and when it seems appropriate, give your anotted Handbook to an Apprentice Trainer preparing themselves to deliver their Practice Practice Expand The Box Training, but tell them to get their own too!

     

    After you have printed, read, study and marked the entire Practice Expand The Box Handbook, taken a photo of your organic lifefull Handbook and send it to the Trainer Path, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.07 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

    STUDY THE DISTINCTIONARY FROM A TO Z FROM A TRAINER'S POINT OF VIEW

    TRNRPATH.08

    School has deeply wounded us about studying. Now, most of us carry the thoughtware that studying means learning by heart for the test. For the desolation of some, but the delight for others, on the Trainer Path, there is no test that you can memorise for. That does not mean there is no test. Everything is a test.

     

    Haven't you figured that out yet? Your partner is testing you all the time - Will he be seduced by my White Widow offers? Has she truly left the Patriarchy and will refuse to give me her center? Can he left himself be out of control and enter the Feminine garden with me? Can she answer 'Yes or No' to a 'Yes or No' question? The Universe is ongoingly test you - Are you committed? Will you do the thing you say you would do and have Integrity? Can you make a promise and keep it? Can you enter Contenance when the door opens? Can you get out of the way for Gaia or your Bright Principles to speak through you?

     

    If your partner is testing you and the Universe is testing you, you can be sure that the Trainer Path is testing you. The test is of a different flavour than modern school testing though. The test is not how well you can memorize, but who are you Being and who are you Becoming.

     

    Some people have told us that reading the Distinctionary has changed their Life. You bet it did! What it will do for you can only be found out by reading it yourself.

     

    The experiment starts with you printing the Distinctionary and binding it. Make sure that the margins are wide enough for you to take notes in them.

     

    The experiment is simple: Study the Distinctionary with others. Discover what studying in Archiarchy is like. Studying can be made into a adventureous, nourrishing, rollercoaster-like discovery journey. Like Elizabeth Gilbert said in Eat Pray Love (I am paraphrasing, I could not find the exact quote): "There are explorers who will ascend Everest, or dive in the deepest part of the oceans, or even look to reach the Moon. But here I am surrounded by as true explorers: the people who are willing to look inside of themselves, even in the darkest part, and discover inner territories that might have never been seen, or touched by anyone else." The Distinctionary is a Map, a doorway into such adventrue. Almost no one makes use of it. But how can a Trainer pass such a fantastic opportunity?

     

    Read through it from start to finish in a weekly Study Group or Possibility Team. Read it from the point of view of a Trainer who delivers and lands those distinctions in transformational space for the benefit of your clients and participants. As you read along, invent experiments for practicing the new thoughtware in your and their daily life. This is where the High Level Fun really starts! Do the experiments, and report on your finding the following week.

     

    Extra experiment #1: (look for the Matrix Point in the SPARK Translator website): for most Trainers, English is not your first language. The Distinctionary is one of the foundational document of Possibility Management (it being thoughtware for Next Culture - Archiarchy). If your mother tongue is different than English, the extra experiment is to take a stand for the Distinction of Possibility Management to be available in your mother tongue. The experiment is to translate the Distinctionary into your own mother tongue. Ask for Clinton and Anne-Chloé to build a copy of the Distinctionary website in your own language and give you the editing rights.

     

    Extra experiment #2: Print 17 copies of the Distinctionary and bind them so that they are easy to read without losing any pages. Distribute the 17 copies to people who will read the printed Distinctionary, and become someone else while doing so. Make the deal with these people that when they are done, they are to give their copy to the next person.

     

    After you have printed, read, invented experiments for yourself and your Team, through the entire Distinctionary, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 8 Matrix Points.

    BUILD THOUGHTMAPS-DELIVERY LIQUID STATE RESILIENCE

    TRNRPATH.09

    Possibility Management Thoughtmaps are 5-body-3-worlds-multi-dimensional Maps. Possibility Managament Thoughtmaps are, however, not the territory. Maps are Maps. The territory is What Is. Thoughtmaps are navigation tools to operate in the territory. The closer your map is to the territory - meaning the more it describes accurately Reality, the more grip you have to accept with What Is, and ultimately transform What Is.

     

    Possibility Management Thoughtmaps are discovered out of the necessity for the Trainer to be with What Is so as to gain the power to transform it, which means the maps are also pulled out of the source from the Authentic Questions of the participants.

     

    Possibility Management Thoughtmaps are Memeticly Engineered compasses that when landed in someone changes the structure of their Thoughtware, their Being or their Inner Structure. The sucess of a Thoughtmap relies mostly on your ability to remain in Liquid State about the Thoughtmap.

     

    The purpose of this experiment is about getting used to bathing in the Liquid States of Thoughtmap-delivery by discovering and re-discovering Possibility Management Thoughtmaps.

     

    The Source of the Map is endless. Each time, you deliver a Possibility Management Thoughtmap you can discover a new dimension, layer or distinction in the map - if you allow yourself to be in Liquid State as you deliver them.

     

    With a certain resilience to Thougthmap-delivery Liquid State, there will be a new space in yourself for new Thoughtmap to come through you. You will have dropped enough resistance baggage for that Thoughtmap to be delivered and documented for the benefit of all Possibility Managers. In this case, please send your new Thoughtmap to Clinton Callahan, so it can be added to the PM Thoughtmaps website.

     

    The experiment is to over the next few months deliver every Thoughtmap from the PM Thoughtmaps website to someone: one person on the street, your 3Cell, your Possibility Team, your Study Group, your partner, even the Trainer Path. Find and jack into the Source of the Map, and deliver it from there. This mean you can deliver Map you have never heard of before, ones which you do not know what they are about. Reading them or looking at them on the website will have about 1% of the effect of delivering them from the Source.

     

    Extra experiment #1: for the Thoughtmap that you have delivered more than 3 times during an Expand The Box Training, the experiment is to deliver them backwards.

     

    Extra experiment #2: for the 10 ETB Foundational Thoughtmaps (the ones that you deliver during the first session of an ETB), deliver the 10 Thoughtmaps in less than 20 minutes, including questions from the participants.

     

    After you have delivered ALL the Possibility Management Thoughtmaps, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 8 Matrix Points.

    DELIVER 53 NON-ETB-NON-LAB PM PROCESSES TO A DEDICATED POSSIBILITY TEAM

    TRNRPATH.10

    Possibility Management healing, initiation, and transformation Processes have been empirically developed by small teams of Edgeworkers, Riftwalkers, and Possibilitators throughout Europe, the Americas, New Zealand and Australia since 1975.

     

    How many of Possibility Management Processes do you not know about? Probably a number of them! Luckily for you, a group of dedicated (you might even say neurotic) documenters have kept putting down in writing the invented Processes. As a side comment, the process of writing down what has happened is an Alchemical act. As Lee Lozowick said: "If you do not write it down, it did not happened."

     

    The experiment is to build a Possibility Team which purpose is to go through Possibility Management Processes that do not belong to Expand The Box Training or Possibility Labs.

     

    Note: It is detrimental to deliver the Processes from Expand The Box outside of an Expand The Box Training. These are Processes that need the container of a 3-to-5 days Training held in the particular context of Expand The Box. It is the same for the Lab. Lab Processes are mostly not publicly available on the PM Processes website, if some are, there is an explicit warning at the top of the write-up that they are Lab Processes.

     

    First, go through the PM Processes website, and choose the 10 first Processes that attract you to deliver. Create the Possibility Team around these 10 Processes, which means the Possibility Team is closed for 10 weeks.

    Deliver 1 Process per week, and take notes of what could be improved in the Processes, or alternative roads to explore. Send those notes back to Clinton or Anne-Chloé, who will make sure they go into the official Process write-up.

     

    After you are done with the first 10 Processes, choose the next 10 Processes, and open the Possibility Team to new members. Keep going until you have delivered 53 non-ETB-non-Lab PM Processes from the PM Processes website.

     

    That is enough for one year of Possibility Team!

     

    After you have delivered 53 of the Possibility Management Processes, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.10 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 11 Matrix Points (+ the Matrix Point attach to each Process).

    CALL 5 PEOPLE WHO HAVE BEEN CENTRAL TO THE EVOLUTION OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT

    TRNRPATH.11

    Anyone discovering Possibility Management now is jumping onto a moving train. Even if you have been in the context for a few years (which would be the case if you are seriously decided to become a Possibility Management Trainer), the history of Possibility Management start back in 1975, and lots has happens since then.

     

    We - Clinton mostly - have recently realized that the lineages, history, and legends - which are so familiar to the 'old rabbits' - remain invisible to the 'new rabbits'. Yet understanding the origins of the Possibility Management gameworld is integral to its richness. Possibility Management has roots, shoots, fruits, hoots, books, legends, errors, and artifacts.

     

    The experiment starts with simply reading the Museum of Possibility Management website. As you read through the website, choose 5 people who have contributed to the gameworld of Possibility Management's Evolution. Call them. The purpose of the call is first, for you to show your appreciation of the Path they have taken that has provided such Clarity for the gameworld, and the Healing and Transformation of thousands of people. Tell them how you made use of the distinction they discovered. Additionally, question them about their more recent discovery and how you could make use of them for your own Circle?

     

    If in the case, they are not inclined to talk to you, write them a letter. Best a hand written letter, or an email if that is your last resort with the same purpose as for the call.

     

    This is a part of becoming a Village Weaver. A Village has history. A Village is not bound by its history, however, it does not mean that we can forget the shoulders that we are standing on while delivering our work. On the contrary, honoring the history is one of the way to unbound ourselves from it.

     

    After you have had a call with all five persons, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.11 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

    DIAGRAM THE TRAINER GUILD (& POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT) GAMEWORLD AND TAKE YOUR PLACE IN IT

    TRNRPATH.12

    The Trainer Guild is the alliance of the Possibility Management Trainers who are dedicated to providing access to the Tools, Thoughtmaps, Distinctions, and Processes of Possibility Management around the world through delivering Expand The Box Training and Possibility Lab.
     
    The Trainer Guild uses Torus Technology for its organizational design and flow of energy. This means the Trainer Guild functions because of its Infinity Ring.
     
    This experiment is for you to get to know who, behind-the-scene, is nurturing the Possibility Management gameworld; and eventually take your place where you are needed and wanted to source the Trainer Guild and the Trainer Path for the next generations to come.
     
    This experiment starts by reading the Trainer Guild website, then follow the link into the Gameworld Builder and Gameworld Theory websites. Read up on what Evolutionary Archiarchal Gameworlds are and how they function. Possibility Management, as the Trainer Guild and the Trainer Path are Archiarchal Evolutionary Gameworlds. They are designed by the context of Radical Responsibility and the Bright Principles of Love, Clarity, and Possibility.
     
    Such gameworlds are run by people who authentically care about the well being and the evolution of the gameworld. Most often, these people are not paid (monetarily) to do what they do - that is true for the Possibility Management gameworld. The reward of holding space, guarding and evolving Possibility Management which provides immense Clarity and Possibility for thousands of people around the world is payment.
     
    As you keep reading the Trainer Guild website, diagram the organizational chart and flow of energy of the gameworld of Possibility Management and your place in it as a source person. Present your diagram to the Trainer Path in one of the meeting. Then, when you are clear on what you want to source in the gameworld, call up the spaceholder for the Infinity Ring and make your Transformational Proposals. They are so many dimensions of Possibility Management that are yet to come to life, and are left, for now, in a lethargic state only due to the lack of spaceholders.
     
    After have diagramed the Possibility Management gameworld and presented it to the Trainer Path, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.12 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

    LISTEN TO ALL THE TRAINER TALKS ON PM TRAINER PATH PODBEAN

    TRNRPATH.13

    The Trainer Talks on the PM Trainer Path Podbean are recordings of weekly calls from the Global Trainer Path Global, the Possibilitator Training meeting (when a Trainer joins the call), the (now inactive) Possibility Team Spaceholder Skills, and the (now inactive) Practice Space as well as 'old' Tapes from Clinton's early Trainer Days.

     

    The experiment is listen to ALL them!

     

    After listening to ALL the Tainer Talks, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points (+ the Matrix Codes attached to every talk).

    CARRY A TRAINER ARTEFACT ON YOUR PERSON

    TRNRPATH.14

    The experiment is simple but maybe not easy. Carry on your person at all time (next to you when you shower or sleep), for the rest of your life, at least one Trainer artefact in addition to your Possibility Stone, your Archetypal Lineage Talisman, your watch, your Beep! Book and pen.

    For example:

    • A miniature Voice Blaster
    • Your magic wand of Declaration
    • Colorful elastic bands that can be given out as a reminding factor for a practice
    • A Possibility Paintbrush
    • A Gloden Key
    • A Disk of Nothing
    • ...
    Due to the third rule of Possibility Management, 'Do not get arrested', we recommend that you do not carry weapons such as samurai steel swords. However, carrying a wooden bokken for a month or two is acceptable, and actually recommended as part of your Trainer Path.
     
    After carrying a Trainer artefact for 2 months, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Point.

    USE YOUR OWN PERSONAL RESEARCH AND EXPERIMENTATION TO BECOME MAGIC

    TRNRPATH.15

    The basis of this experiment is for you to stop believing in magic and actually become magic. And by 'research', we mean your actual inspired efforts to find out what is possible to create and experience that might seem impossible for an 'ordinary' human being. As Robert H. Heinlein cleverly notice: "One man’s 'magic' is another man’s engineering. 'Supernatural' is a null word.” This mean magic can be learned and practiced.

     

    Becoming magic is being grounded in Reality enough that you can distinguished what is real and what is fake, in yourself, in others, and in what is possible. Nonlinear Possibility - magic - lies in the details (but not with the devil, excuse the pun).

     

    The experiment is choose one skill that is far beyond your capacity to master. For example, bending silver spoons with your hands, psychically diagnosting the ailement of someone you do not know accross the world, listening and speaking to animals, communicatin with Gaia to the degree that she can tell you which plants is poisonous or healing, transporting your body to other planets and universes, etc...

     

    Research books, videos, podcasts about the skill. Do as much research as you can before contacting the person who can teach you this particular kind of 'magic'. Call them up and do whatever is needed for them to come into the Trainer Path, during an online meeting or a physical Training, to deliver the distinctions, tools and practices needed for the people in the Trainer Path to have access to this magic skill.

     

    After the magic training session in the Trainer Path, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.15 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

    BRING A TEAM OF TRAINERS THROUGH AN INITIATION TOGETHER

    TRNRPATH.16

    On the Trainer Path, there are necessary Adulthood and Archetypal Initiations that are not provided in Expand The Box or Possibility Lab. It is not that the context of Possibility Management cannot contain these Initiations, it is mostly that other contexts deliver these Initiations marvellously and there are so many other Initiations that no other context than Possibility Management deliver that we are busy enough with our stuff.

     

    The list of Initiations indispensible for your the Trainer Path that are delivered outside of Possibility Management are listed on the Initiations website. These are Initiations such as Fire Walking, Family Constellation, Vision Quest, ManKind Project, Radical Honesty, etc...

     

    The experiment is to organize one Initiation delivered outside of the Possibility Management context for Possibility Trainers and Possibilitators. You organize the date, time, logistics, registration, payment, and, maybe the most difficult part, for the Trainer Pathers and Possibilitators to engage this Initiation as a Team, as a Village. This could include for, example, that if someone does not have the financial resources, or time resource to come, that you organize yourself as a Team for these people to be able to come.
     
    After the completion of the Initiation, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.16 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points (+ the Matrix Point gained by the Initiation itself).

    CREATE A TORUS TECHNOLOGY RUN GAMEWORLD TO TRAIN TRAINERS TO DELIVER TORUS TECHNOLOGY

    TRNRPATH.17

    For many years, in the Possibility Management gameworld, we have searched for a meeting format that meets four important criteria:

    1. Simple to learn and use.
    2. Non-hierarchical, based on a circular or galaxical organizational chart and not a pyramid.
    3. Effectively includes and empowers a wide variety of unique initiated individuals.
    4. Unleashes and integrates group intelligence for efficient and wise decision-making.

    It has been a struggle.

     

    At long last, here is something that truly inspires us: Torus Technology. The decision-making, meeting technology and power-structure that we used in the Possibility Management, the Possibilitator Training, the Trainer Guild and the Trainer Path.

     

    As an Expand The Box Trainer, and even more so as a Possibility Lab Trainer, it is inevitable that you will come across, or more accurately be thrown into gameworld malfunctions. For the first reason, that most of your edgeworking clients do not even know what a gameworld is, let alone Torus Technology. Most of your edgeworking clients are still sucked into the hierarchical-psychopathic-run-leadership model while trying to bring their vision to life. It is painful to witness how many well intended projects and gameworlds collapse due to the lack of Clarity about how to running Evolutionary Gameworlds. This, for example, can be the reason why organizers of Expand The Box Trainings for a Community, Ecovillage, or another organization do not pull through, and instead are lost in inner wars and power games. If this is the case for you, drop the idea of the Expand The Box all together (for the moment) and shift gears into upgrading the Context and Clarity of their current gameworld.

     

    This is one example as to why, as a Trainer, it is crucial that you are well versed in using, delivering and implementing Torus Technology for already established and new Edgeworking gameworlds. There is much to learn and many traps to fall into. Yes, you will mostly learn about those while delivering Torus Technology. However, you might want learn a thing or two from the previous mistakes made by Trainers who have been there before you.

     

    For now, what we have learned in packed into the Torus Technology website.

     

    The experiment is to establish a temporary gamewold with a group of at least 12 people, ideally Possibilitators and Trainers. The members do not need to be physically close, the gameworld meetings can happen online. The purpose of the gameworld is to learn how to use, deliver and implement Torus Technology for Edgeworking gameworlds around the world. What this means is that you are design a training program for Torus Technology Trainer, that includes you! You teach best what you most need to learn!

     

    Make abundant use of the Torus Technology website, as well as the four or five Gameworld dedicated websites.

     

    The additional component of this gameworld is that it uses Torus Technology as its own meeting and decision-making technology.

     

    The gameworld has a lifespan of at least 4 weeks, and an end-life of maybe never, if you take the opportunity of creating a whole new Possibilitator Specialty: Torus Technology Trainer.

     

    Whether you decide to go ahead with the Torus Technology specialty, please keep sharp and extensive notes about your findings both on how to run a temporary gameworld on Torus Technology and the Trainer Training program you are developing. The completion of this experiment comes with writing a report of the results of your experiments on Torus Technology.

     

    In the worst case scenario in which you do not write a public report, please send all your notes (even in the bad condition) to Clinton and Anne-Chloé, who will know where to put them so they can be of use for other people.

     

    After holding and navigate 4-week of a Torus Technology run gameworld, writing the report and publishing it online, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.17 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 10 Matrix Points.

    CREATE A PRACTICE SPACE FOR TRAINER SKILLS FOR OTHER TRAINERS

    TRNRPATH.18

    One of the best places to practice Trainer Skills at the moment in your regional Possibilitator Training group. The Trainer Path meetings are, at the moment, a space focusing on deepening the context of Expand The Box, Possibility Lab, and Trainer Path. That, sometimes includes skills practice, not always. In the Possibilitator Training, you are holding space for skilled spaceholders to take their context and practices to another level. This is what Expand The Box is about: unlocking Next Culture spaceholders. What better place to start then with Possibilitators?

     

    This experiment is about unfolding a different part of your Trainer Being. That part that is Taking a Stand for your commitment to the Trainer Path and the success of your fellow Possibility Management Trainers.

     

    The experiment is to organize a 3-to-5-day Trainer Path Lab or a Trainer Path Practice Skills Days, either online or offline for Trainers, including yourself, to have a dedicated space to practice new skills, go through Emotional Healing Processes and Initiations in a Trainer Path context held space. This does not mean that you are holding space for the entire Trainer Path Lab, however it might. The Trainer Path could include inviting different Trainers - Possibility Management and other context - to hold space for a specific dimension of the Trainer Path.

     

    Warning! It has been assumed in the past that holding space for Trainers is 'easier' than holding space for beginner people with 'less matrix'. The assumption probably blossoms from the idea that Trainers have more capacity to surrender to Liquid States and will 'have your back' as someone who is committed to their commitment. This is the warning: it is mostly not so. Trainers are well-defended in their identity as Trainers, they have 'mastered' the distinctions to be able to create more elegant and undetectable Bullshit. In addition, you are faced with immense Gremlins and Beings that need a depth of Transformation and Risk to be well fed. When hungry, Gremlins tend to retaliate. You do not want to have to 'deal' with hungry Trainer Gremlins!

     

    Here are a few hints that can make a world of difference.

    1. Trainers might want to generalise responsibility out of existence by using the very sneaky concept of 'we'; hiding behind 'we are all Trainers'. Forget it: there needs to be ONE spaceholder. And if you are doing this experiment, the spaceholder is you. Do not give away the spaceholding. Ever. At the same time, be that which can Shift! and Go! when necessary. 
    2. Your ability to create the space needed and wanted will need to include your commitment to hold and navigate space for Being that are bigger than you. It is often assumed that you can only serve Beings 'smaller' than you, meaning they do not have the Presence or Clarity that you do. It is possible to create value for bigger Beings. Commit to that and find the many unreasonable ways to do so.
    3. Immediately put the Poop on the Table - meaning have a metaconversation - about Trainers defendedness against a Life of Learning and a Life of Practice. Be Radically Honest that this Training is designed to undermine any resistance to Evolution so that something Extraordinary and Archetypal can occur.
    4. The Evolutionary business is show business. Give them a show! Start with a BANG and leave them laughing! Give Trainers more than what they can chew on. Move sideways. Each new space is a new dimension. Trainer Beings (and conscious Gremlin) thrive on nonlinearity. This mean that you might need to prepare yourself significantly. For example, organizing a Theater piece for Trainer when you are not a trained Theater director is a feat that cannot be thrown from the hip.
    5. Demand that the Trainers behave as Spaceholders. Any minuscule whiff of complaining, backstabbing, triangulating, victimhood, undermining of your spaceholding or anyone else's, put it immediately on the table through Vacuum Learning: "How can a person like you, an Expand The Box Trainer, is willing to cripple a Trainer learning space? I do not understand that. Would you please explain to me?" They want to have a victim conversation, they are in the wrong gameworld. They can either Shift! Go! or go through an Emotional Healing Process. In this case, The Purple Card becomes quite useful.

    After celebrating the organization and the completion of a 3-to-5-day Trainer Path Lab / Practice Days, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.18 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 11 Matrix Points (in addition to the 21 points of participating in such a Training).

    NEVER STOP BUILDING YOUR CIRCLE BY EXCHANGING YOUR CIRCLE WITH OTHER TRAINERS' CIRCLES

    TRNRPATH.19

    You want to do something to make the world a better place? You think you can do it all by yourself? Think again.

    The world is complex, and the status quo is massive. The way to make a difference in a complex massive system is to use a complex massive solution-generating organism: Your Circle.
