    This is the start of the Your Circle website, and I love it! I love it because it is so true, and I did not even write it.

     

    The proposed experiment about Your Circle is definitely a Trainer experiment. Therefore, the suggestion is first to do a serious number of experiments from the Your Circle website so that, for one thing, you have build a close and solid Circle of about 600 people, and that you have gone through a number of Emotional Healing Processes about being visible, being on a Team, being a spaceholder for a Team, expanding your concept of Family to include the pathwalkers of your Circle, putting your parents and other ancestors behind you, being able to commit to someone else's commitment, etc...

     

    After delivering Healing and Transformational spaces for a while to 'your people', it will become obvious, that you cannot provide the diversity of Clarity, Healing and facets of Being necessary for your Clients to grow up and grow into their own unique Being. Children are raised by a Village. It is the same for Adults, they are made by a variety of different Adults.

     

    What better Adults to send your people to than your fellow Trainer Pathers?

     

    The experiment is to choose 3 Trainers (it can also be Possibilitators) with whom your Circle could benefit from having access to their Nonmaterial Value. Call those 3 Trainers up and tell them: "I want you to add my people to your newsletter so they can receive the jewels of your research and join your Events." Then ask them: "With whom they have shared their Circle with?"; and if not, "why not? what is the way? what is their Emotional Healing Process(es) to go through?"

     

    The experiment is complete only when you have received a confirmation from each of the 3 Trainers/Possibilitators that they have added your email list to their newsletter sending list. This means your mission does not end when you have send the file, you commit to your colleagues commitment to increase their Circle, no matter how much it freaks them out.

     

    After sending an excel sheet of Your Circle to those 3 people, and have received the confirmation from them that they have added 'your people' to your Circle, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.19 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

    CREATE AN 'EXPAND THE BOX' IN YOUR AREA FOR ANOTHER TRAINER

    TRNRPATH.20

    Without a Circle, who do you think will come to your Expand The Box Trainings? It took us a long time, but we have learned the long hard way that you will not be invited to deliver your Practice Expand The Box until you have at least 600 people in your Circle to whom you send a monthly newsletter, and who actually read your newsletter. An easy way to find out if they read your newsletter is if you deliver a worktalk or a Rage Club, you easily have 20 people registered.

     

    Contrary to modern culture belief, the more Expand The Box happen in your area, the more participants you will have in your Expand The Box. The kind of treasure that we deal in, as Possibility Management Trainer, grows when it is given away. The survival concept of the more a service or product is scarce, the more it is valuable leads to severe competition, backstabing, power games and other Gremlin feeding frenzies. If you still carry with you concepts, constructs, beliefs and wounds about competition, go through the necessary Emotional Healing Processes to enter the Creative Collaboration and Winning Happening of the Trainer Path.

     

    This is an experiment mostly designed for Trainer Pathers who are not yet fully certified Expand The Box Trainers. However, if you are a fully certified Trainer and are still plagued by competition and scarcity mindset, this could very well be a healing experiment for you.

     

    The idea is that the first (or next) Expand The Box in your area is to be delivered by someone else than yourself. Through the processes of creating an Expand The Box Training for someone else, you will build huge amount of matrix needed in 'selling' Transformation and Possibility, and will build a solid Circle for when it is your time to be on the hot seat.

     

    The experiment is therefore to create an Expand The Box Training in your area for an already certificied Trainer of the Trainer Path, for a minimum of 25 participants. The process of building a Circle of 25 registered paying participants in an Expand The Box usually takes 1-to-2 year. About the same amount of time that it takes to be on the Trainer Path before you are invited to deliver your Practice Expand The Box.

    During this experiment, you will strenghten your skills:

    • In Radically Relating with the Trainer who will deliver the Expand The Box Training: with your center, grounding cord, bubble and sword out, be Radically Honest about what you think you can do and what have not done yet.
    • In asking for help from Your Teams, experiments, Possibility and Emotional Healing Processes.
    • In actually doing the experiments that are offered to you by your Teams before asking for any other experiment.
    • In being visible in your local community.
    • In delivering your Nonmaterial Value abudantly and ecstatically, not for the purpose of registering people for the Expand The Box Training, but for the purpose of providing the glimpse of a completely new Context from which to Be and Relate. When people want more of this context, they will come to Expand The Box.
    • In delivering The Menu every other week at a minimum in market, Universtiy campuses and edgeworking Café.

    During the Expand The Box Training itself, request to have check-in meetings with the delivering Trainer in the breaks, where you can share what you are noticing, not noticing, and any questions that you carry. Ask for feedback, coaching and Possibilities for you to step into the space as an Apprentice Expand The Box Trainer.

     

    After successfully creating a 25-participant Expand The Box Training in your area and celebrating your success with the Trainer Path, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.20 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 21 Matrix Points.

    DO LEGEND MAKING TRAINER ACTION EVERYDAY FOR TWO WEEKS

    TRNRPATH.21

    If you speak out, you become visible. Being visible makes you a potential target for projections, expectations, jealousies, vengeance, even abuse. Many of you survive behind your skills for staying invisible. The idea of building an inner structure capable of maintaining commitments by which you become visible is inconceivably scary.

     

    This experiment is about being visible as a Trainer by causing chaordic, organic Legend Making actions that open doors and provide nonlinear experiences to individuals and small groups.

     

    Each person you empower with a Legend Making Trainer action returns to their lives with the experience you provided for them. If they were fed by what you offered, then they may search for more of that kind of experience. Suddenly they are on the Path. You have caused a ripple in the morphogenetic field of the human race.

     

    As your ripples go out into the world, they naturally combine with the ripples that Possibility Managers and other Edgeworkers are making. These ripples randomly interact with each other (it looks random, but is likely orchestrated by E.C.C.O. at work, creating beneficial coincidences…). Somehow the general human awareness miraculously changes. When a bunch of little waves add upon each other, a transformational tsunami can suddenly arise. This kind of personal evolution is sustainable. When you learn to replace yourself, evolution becomes regenerative.

     

    Legend-Making actions are for example:

    • Taking an unreasonable Stand for an individual or a small group of people
    • Create a valueable space for people who are ‘bigger’ than you
    • Cavitating unexpected extraordinary spaces in the midst of ordinariness
    • Being unreasonably, authentically and radiantly happy as a source of nourrishment for your friends, family and strangers
    • Invoking the potential of someone's Being or Adult with no agenda that it will serve you at all
    • Taking on an Herculeus task and finishing it (for example, sewing a flag for your Nanonation, making an entrie dress made out of mango seeds, building a wooden cabin for Emotional Healing Processes, write 1000 wikipedia page for Possibility Management distinctions, ...)
    These are examples, there is an endless nonlinear actions that are Legend Making. There is no method to Legend Making Trainer actions, it is a source to jack into and never let go. Then it is who you are to be Legendary.
     
    Warning: it is possible to make 'bad' legends about yourself. For example, legends about your lack of integrity, that you carry abundant resentments, or your triangulating skills, these are 'bad' legends. They are to distinguish with true Legend Making actions that have disturbed or offended people. As Brad Blanton says: "Bad publicity is still publicity."

     

    In practical terms, the experiment is to consciously make Legend Making Trainer actions EVERY DAY for two weeks, and report daily on them in the Trainer Path group.

     

    After making at least 14 Legend Making Trainer actions and reporting them daily in the Trainer Path group, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.21 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

    MAKE 10 INTERVIEWS AS A TRAINER REPRESENTING THE TRAINER GUILD

    TRNRPATH.22

    Each worktalk that you give, each article that you write, each workshop that you deliver in a festival will bring, on average, one seriously committed person into Your Circle. One person. That's all. Transformation cannot be marketed as any other regular product, because you Transformation is not attractive to the Box, it is delightful for the Being. This means the person who will join your Circle have worked hard enough to create even the smallest gap between their Box and their Being.

     

    To build a 600-people Circle, it takes 600 worktalks, workshops, Rage Club, Fear Club, Festival, articles, videos, ... and interviews.

     

    Interview might be one of the most powerful ways to access different circles of edgeworking context. During interviews, your job is to preach to the choir. You are already talking to edgeworkers, you are simply providing them with tools, distinctions, and processes that they never heard of and that they can already apply in the edgeworking life.

     

    Possibility Management is thoughtware for Next Culture - Archiarchy. Some of the people that you reach in your interviews might jump both feet into Possibility Management. Another possibility is for these edgeworkers to bring Possibility Management distinctions into their context to make it more powerful.

     

    The experiment is to find 10 platforms or contexts or podcasts for you to be interviewed as a Possibility Management Trainer representing the Trainer Guild of Possibility Management. This means a couple of things.

     

    One, you might need to contact 50 platforms to have a succesful 'Yes' from 10 of them.

    In addition, you are not making the interview for or from yourself, you are jacking into the larger context of a Trainer Training program of Archan spaceholders and speaking from and for that. You might notice that the bigger the context you can represent, the bigger space you create for your Archetypal Lineage and Bright Principles to come through.

     

    Give the 10 interviews, and publish them on your own personal podcast or Youtube channel. Send them also to Anne-Chloé for them to be added to the Next Culture Radio and Possibility Management TV.

     

    After the 10 interviews are published online, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.22 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 10 Matrix Points.

    LEARN THE PRACTICES OF ARCHIARCHAL ECONOMICS, TAKE THEM ON AND DESIGN A TRAINING PROGRAM

    TRNRPATH.23

    Archiarchal Economics operates on the other side of a Gap In Knowing from Capitalist Patriarchal Empire Economics. What is needed now are Bridges to Archiarchal Economics. As an Expand The Box Trainer, or a Possibility Lab Trainer, you are one of those bridges.

     

    It is time to educate yourself on the context and pratices of Archiarchal Economics. As often, it starts by ready the website Archiarchal Economics, slowly, and entirely. Take notes, and write down questions in your Beep! Book as you go along, you will need them for the rest of the experiment.

     

    The experiment is for one entire week, 7 days, move in with 3, 4 or 5 people who are ready to do the experiment of living in Archiarchal Economics together. Live together and spend 0 money (FIAT currencies: dollars, euros, ruppies, dong, baht, ...). The purpose is for you and your Team to deepen the context of exchanging your Nonmaterial Value for what you need (food, wood, a hammer, a jacket, a book, ...) without the intermediary of money.

     

    Along with that...

    Discover how much free time you have for your Life when you are not a slave of a capitalistic scarcity-driven Patriarchal economic system.

    Discover your transformational work, your nonmaterial value.

    Discover the skills - also the Radical Relating skills - that you need to do your transformational work.

    Discover that people in modern culture are oriented towards problem-solving, whereas Archiarchal Economics is oriented towards Possibility. It is a shift from scarcity (there is a problem) to Possibility (let's discover what is possible when there is no problem).

     

    Archiarchal Economics is an Economy of Possibility.

     

    You, and most people, are not wired to ongoingly ask for Possibility, even for what they can have for breakfast. It is an immense amount of group intelligence, connection and intimacy wasted due to the simple fact that the context of Economics was never questionned and researched before.

     

    It is about to change! For you at least!

     

    Part of the 7-day experiment is to ongoingly document what you figure out: not only what works and what does not work, but the experience itself to live in the context of Archiarchal Economics. This includes, as Trainers, to draw up a training program as a Bridge across the Gap of Knowing from Patriarchal Economics to Archiarchal Economics. This training program could be delivered in Economy bachelor and master at University, to Ecovillages and Gaiavillages, as well as Possibility Managers and Possibilitators.

     

    After spending 7 days together in the Archiarchal Economics Bridge-House, and drawing up a full-fledge Bridges to Archiarchal Economics training program, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.23 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 22 Matrix Points.

    GET REAL ABOUT WHERE YOUR CULTURAL LOYALTIES LIE

    TRNRPATH.24

    "We?" "What do you mean by 'we', white man?"

    What do you mean when you use words such as 'our government decided...', 'our language does not have...', 'our taxes pay for...', 'our army went to...', 'in our culture...'?

    Oh really, you can decided where the taxes you pay to your government are funneled towards?

    You have a hands in where the efforts of your government are directed to?

    You have an army? Then, why isn't your army protecting every single tree from being cut down? Why isn't your army planting millions of trees every day and keeping them alive? Why haven't you requisitionned everyone of your soldiers to restore ecosystems?

    Is it true that you identify with the rule of Law of your birth culture that is exterminating Life on planet Earth at the fatest rate possible? Are you upholding its norms, its laws, its social ways, its lifestyle? If so, why? If so, how can you be a Possibility Trainer? If not, why do you say 'we'?

     

    The experiment is for you to get real about where your cultural loyalties really lie. Who are you flowing your energy towards? Who are you giving your money to? How are you supporting the hypnotisation of the general population? Which laws are you abiding by?

     

    Find 3 committed sharp-sworded friends who are willing to have this Radially Honest interrogation. Before the interview starts, your 3 centered-grounded-bubbled friends make an extra bubble of cultural space, and shift their identity into a New Refugee Culture, such as Extinction Rebellion, or Deep Green Resistance, or from the Na'vi People on Pandora (from Avatar). Count on the interview to be one hour. Ask your friends to be vicious with their questions, ask them to not believe any of your justification, reasons, clever answers. Ask them to commit to your commitment to get real.

     

    Write down their feedback, their questions, and their Possibilities for you, even if you do not understand them. Do not write what you think you they said, write what they say. Ask your friends to ask you to read back to them what you wrote down.

     

    If it is not a shocking idea to be Global Citizen these days, when you can fly to anywhere across the global in less than 24 hours and for less than a 1000 Euros (often much less!), it is excrutiatingly revolutionary though to abandon your birth culture as an obsolete cultural gameworld that has run its course and has already kicked the bucket.

     

    Your biggest fear might be that the usual burden of being framed-up by your existing circumstances has been entirely removed. You could have an entirely new future!

     

    If your shap-sworded interviewer friends are courageous Trainers, open the door for the Possibility for each of them to go through the same process of 'Getting Real about their cultural loyalties'.

     

    Write an article about the steps of your process in exiting the prison of your Birth Culture and been reborn as a New Refugee. Write also about the opportunity for connection and creation that you now share with fellow refugees, whether they are Armaggedon Refugee or Evolutionary Refugees.

     

    After being interrogated regarding your loyalties and providing clarity for your Circle about the possibilities of being a New Refugee (by writing and publishing an article), please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.24 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

    DECLARE YOUR OWN CULTURE AS ARCHIARCHAL AND PROVE IT

    TRNRPATH.25

    One of the purposes of the previous experiment "GET REAL ABOUT WHERE YOUR CULTURAL LOYALTIES LIE" is to lead you to the question: "Which culture do you live in?"

     

    So, which culture do you live in?

     

    The experiment is this: take a leap and declare yourself living in an Archiarchal Culture and to be able to prove it.

     

    Your Archiarchal Culture needs a name, a flag, a Codex (Constitution) and ideally other people living in your Culture with you.

     

    Between who you are right now and someone who actually lives in an Archiarchal Culture lay a number of Emotional Healing Processes to go through and Clarity to be gained.

     

    My guess is that without taking the leap of declaring yourself been an Archan (someone who lives in an Archiarchal Culture), you have no necessity to go through the Emotional Healing Processes or do the research necessary to be clear about what it takes to Cavitate, Hold and Navigate space for an Archiarchal Culture. This is your chance to put yourself in a position where there is necessity for you to do so. Will you put yourself in that position?

     

    Sometimes it can be useful to put 'la charrue devant les boeufs' - the carriage before the horse, creating a Vacuum force in your life.

     

    If you have not exited the survival strategy to manipulate yourself to do things that you do not want to do or to do what you already want to do, forget about this experiment. Return to 'Go'. Do not collect 200$. In practical terms, go through however many Emotional Healing Processes is needed to get out of this condition. Being a Trainer and Being someone who manipulates themselves are contradictory statements. They cannot live in the same place at once.

     

    Possibility Management is thoughtware for Next Culture-Archiarchy.

    A Possibility Trainer is a living map for Archiarchy.

    The purpose of the research is for you to building enough matrix that living anywhere else than in Archiarchy is too painful for you, and have Integrity with the work that you are delivering in Expand The Box and Labs.

     

    Again, in practical terms, moving into an Archiarchal Culture means building your own Nanonation, Bridge-House or Gaiavillage. The distinction between a Bridge-House and a Nanonation is that Bridge-Houses are for the occupants whereas a Nanonation falls into the bigger picture of creating a UNN: a UNN United Network of Nanonation. For more information about this, please read the Nanonations website.

     

    After creating a webiste, a flag, a Codex for your Archiarchal Culture, please register Matrix Code TRNRPATH.25 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 32 Matrix Points.

    FIND THE RESOURCES

  • QUESTIONS

    50 Questions To Ask Your Trainer-Colleagues

    1. What am I ready enough for that I am not doing yet?

    2. Could you please ask me to tell you in which ways I am ready to provide paid Emotiona Healing Processes through individual or couples Possibility Coaching?

    3. Would you please ask me to provide you with single coaching now?

    4. Would you please facilitate the initiation of me jacking-in to abundance in my life now?

    5. Could you please ask me to explain to you 3 practical ways I can create the cash I need to get to my next Possibility Lab?

    6. I have been researching relationship/intimacy/the goddess/the guardian/gameworld building/our connection with Gaia. Could you please ask me to tell you how I will share this with the world?

    7. Could you please ask me to tell you the next new talk or workshop I will deliver?

    8. Please ask me to tell you how I can create a bridge between where people are and what is possible.

    9. Could you please give me possibilities for new exercise I can do after such or such map/ in the context of this workshop?

    10. Could you please give me possibilities to start a meta-conversation about a particular map?

    11. Could you please tell me in what ways I still behave like an Educator and not an Trainer? Could you coach me to shift to trainer behaviors?

    12. How do you know when a person's Being is more present than another?

    13. Could you please tell me what are the ways you scan people capacity to take more or if they are maxed out?

    14. Could you please give me wild ideas to build my own matrix - that does not include reading books or watching movies?

    15. Could you please tell what is the question that I am not asking you that I should?

    16. Could you please give me feedback of where I am on Healing From School? Could you then give me possibilities for my next step?

    17. Could you please give me feedback of where I am on my way out of patriarchy? Could you then give me possibilities for my next step?

    18. Could you please give me possible way of holding a feelings workshop? What are people most afraid of in these workshop? What kind of exercise are the best to do first?

    19. How can I hold a small talk cafe or intimacy cafe? Could you give me possibilities on how to open such a space?

    20. Could you please give me possibilities of how to create a solid Circle while I am traveling between countries?

    21. Could you please give me feedback and coaching of how I give feedback and coaching?

    22. What are the boldest things you can do/ you have done in a training?

    23. How to make a joke without hurting a participant?

    24. Could you please give me possibilities of how to Set Context for my next possibility team/workshop/rage club/worktalk?

    25. Could you please share with me ten of your best tricks as trainer?

    26. How does separation, competition and mistrust happen most often in a space? What are the ways to shift the space?

    27. What if the participants are sleeping? What are the best way to wake them up?

    28. Could you please give me wild ideas of what kind of workshops are needed and do not exist yet?

    29. How do you use your femininity / masculinity in your training?

    30. When is it useful to yell at someone or give feedback instead of letting it slide? Please give me precise example or memories you have.

    31. How can I empower the trainer type person next to me?

    32. Could you please ask me to give you a list of personal experiment that I can ask the participants to do during the training?

    33. Could you please ask me to give you a list of 'homework' that I can give the participants when they go home after a training?

    34. Could you give me insight of how can I live with paradoxical stories inside of me?

    35. What in your experience is the most powerful story for people to shift?

    36. Could you please tell the most amazing mentoring experience that you have ever received and could you please give that to me?

    37. How can I start my life over again in the context of Archiarchy where initiation has the highest value?

    38. Can you please coach me about how to stay in relationship with my current family and friends while I go through my transformational Liquid States and Initiatory processes?

    39. Which three TPP healing processes would be the most important for me to learn right now?

    40. How do you justify leaving modern culture behind while still deliver your service in modern culture?

    41. What is really blocking me in my moment to moment life from being a radically responsible Pirate (meaning extracting myself from the patriarchy, waking up from being a Zombie, and refusing in almost every circumstances to be a sheep)?

    42. Please pull the rug under me.

    43. Where I am avoiding using my sword of clarity? In other words, where I am making assumptions, where am I enmeshed, where I am being a vampire, a parasite on people or organization, where am I not making boundaries, where am I being sloppy about holding radical responsible spaces, where I am letting my Gremlin feed and paying high prices for the consequences, etc...?

    44. How can I more often consciously use my Bag of Things and my Gremlin as a resources of non-linear possibility so that I can provide bigger services to the individuals and organizations?

    45. Could you please give me one small useful assignment with a deadline for which I can prove to me and you that I have integrity (integrity means that I will do what I say I will do)?

    46. What belief do I cling to as a band-aid over a hole in the side of my Box?

    47. What are my taboos? What are my superstitions that I don't yet recognize as superstitions and still think they are the truth?

    48. Please ask me if I have ended my submissive slave contract with the Church. If have not, ask me by when I will do that. If I refuse to do it, ask me to watch the movie the Mission and then ask me again to explain in detail why I still support the patriarchal hierarchical

    49. How do I create Heaven on Earth right now for me and my friends and colleagues?

    50. What will happen when I die?

    Extra bonus question: Please ask me if I am male or female, and why do I have that story?

    There is a Codex for the Possibility Management gameworld located at https://possibilitymanagement.mystrikingly.com/#codex

     

    There is a specific Codex for each of the Possibilitator Specialties online at its respective website.

     

    The Codex for the Possibilitator Specialty: 'Possibility Management Trainer Path' is located

     

    HERE.

    (there is nothing here right now)

     
    PLEASE NOTE: The Trainer Path Node of the Possibility Management Infinity Ring is currently (December 2022) upgrading the Trainer Path Codex. When the updated version is sufficiently drafted it will available at the above link.
    Thank you for your interest!

StartOver.xyz

NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code TRNRPATH.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
